description:
About the job

Role: Online (Remote)
Job Type: Part-Time Contract
Location: Remote (Work From Home)
Compensation: Up to $7.50 USD/hr, paid weekly




About the Role

We are looking for fluent language professionals to help train and evaluate AI language models. This is a flexible, part-time contract role you can do entirely from home, on your own schedule. If you work with language professionally - as a writer, teacher, translator, tutor, linguist, or language specialist - this role is a strong fit.




What You'll Do

Read and evaluate AI-generated text for quality, accuracy, and fluency
Write short prompts and creative responses to help train AI systems
Rank and compare AI outputs based on clear evaluation criteria
Provide written feedback on language quality




What We're Looking For

Fluency in your language and English
Bachelor's degree or higher, preferably in a humanities, language, or writing-related field
Professional experience working with language - writing, teaching, translating, editing, annotating, or related fields
Strong attention to detail and ability to follow evaluation guidelines
Background in linguistics, academic writing, data annotation, or AI content evaluation is a plus




What You Get

Up to $7.50 USD/hr, paid weekly
Fully remote - work from anywhere
Flexible hours - you set your own schedule
Part-time contract - ideal as a primary or supplemental income source




Equal Opportunity Employer:

We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.

title: Especialista Comercial - Mercado Ads
skills: Vibran energía emprendedora: se mueven por la curiosidad, nunca se rinden y se enfocan en superar sus propios límites.
Dan el máximo porque les gusta trabajar con compromiso y dedicación.
Viven los cambios como oportunidades y aprenden de sus errores.
La excelencia y la ejecución son claves en su forma de hacer las cosas.
Promueven el buen clima, aportan alegría y diversión.
Saben cómo construir con otras personas y disfrutan trabajando en equipo.
Administrar una cartera de clientes, cumpliendo los SLAs corporativos definidos por cada tipo de cliente, generando una relación de confianza, logrando impulsar sus negocios.

Actuar como socio estratégico de marketing digital y experto consultivo para los anunciantes, recomendando best practices, impulsando la experimentación con nuevos productos Ads y conectando los objetivos del cliente con los productos más innovadores de la plataforma.

Desarrollar e implementar estrategias comerciales y de publicidad digital para grandes marcas de Toys & Babies, alineando las necesidades del cliente y los objetivos de Mercado Ads, con un enfoque tanto on como off site.

Gestionar y optimizar campañas publicitarias a través del análisis de KPIs, generación de reportes y propuestas de mejora continua, asegurando la efectividad, adopción de soluciones y entrega exitosa de resultados para los clientes estratégicos.

Identificar nuevas oportunidades de negocio y ejecutar planes de acción comerciales y de upselling, presentando soluciones personalizadas y creativas a lo largo del funnel de usuario, colaborando con equipos cross-funcionales para potenciar el crecimiento de las marcas.Crear alianzas estratégicas con stakeholders clave, como los ejecutivos de cuenta del Marketplace.

Liderar negociaciones con marcas y agencias, desde el cierre de acuerdos anuales (JBPs) hasta la presentación y seguimiento de campañas estratégicas, asegurando relaciones de largo plazo y el desarrollo del footprint de las marcas en Mercado Libre.
Ser profesional de las carreras de Actuaría, Economía, Administración Financiera o afines.
Contar con 5 años de experiencia desarrollada en posiciones similares.
Tener experiencia en posiciones comerciales, ventas o de marketing.
Manejo de herramientas SQL, Big Query, es deseable.
Dominio de Excel y/o Google Sheets.
Ser parte de una compañía con espíritu emprendedor en la que nos encanta pensar en grande y a largo plazo.
Ser protagonista de tu desarrollo en un ambiente de oportunidades, aprendizaje, crecimiento, expansión y proyectos desafiantes.
Compartir y aprender en equipo junto a grandes profesionales y especialistas.
Un excelente clima de trabajo, con todo lo necesario para que vivas una gran experiencia. :)
description:

La plataforma de Mercado Ads permite a marcas pequeñas, y a medianos y grandes anunciantes, promocionar sus productos y servicios con soluciones avanzadas de marketing digital. Aplicamos creatividad en estrategias de performance, con un conocimiento único de perfiles de audiencia y herramientas de analytics avanzadas.

Vibran energía emprendedora: se mueven por la curiosidad, nunca se rinden y se enfocan en superar sus propios límites.

Identificar nuevas oportunidades de negocio y ejecutar planes de acción comerciales y de upselling, presentando soluciones personalizadas y creativas a lo largo del funnel de usuario, colaborando con equipos cross-funcionales para potenciar el crecimiento de las marcas.Crear alianzas estratégicas con stakeholders clave, como los ejecutivos de cuenta del Marketplace.
Liderar negociaciones con marcas y agencias, desde el cierre de acuerdos anuales (JBPs) hasta la presentación y seguimiento de campañas estratégicas, asegurando relaciones de largo plazo y el desarrollo del footprint de las marcas en Mercado Libre.

Te proponemos:

title: Paid Search & Social Specialist

description:
About the job

Launch Your Next Successful Chapter with Veta Virtual! 🚀




💸 Competitive Salary in USD | 🌍 100% Remote | 🎯 Paid Search & Social Role | 🏆 Award-Winning Agency Culture




Veta Virtual is hiring a Paid Search & Social Specialist for a high-growth client in the Digital Marketing industry — an award-winning agency specializing in the automotive vertical, recognized as Best Large SEO Agency and winner of Best Low Budget PPC Campaign at the 2024 US Search Awards. This is a learning-forward role for someone curious, resourceful, and ready to run real campaigns that push what is possible.




🔑 Your Role:




You will manage and optimize paid search and social campaigns for automotive dealership clients — trained and mentored by top specialists while taking real ownership of results. Your day-to-day will involve:




Managing and optimizing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns — delivering higher ROI and lower cost per conversion for automotive dealership clients.
Conducting daily account audits, budget pacing, and campaign adjustments to keep performance on track and spend optimized.
Generating performance reports from Google Ads and Meta — and conducting client calls to present strategies and results clearly and confidently.
Managing OEM reimbursement processes — reviewing requirements, gathering materials, and submitting claims accurately and on time.
Using Google Analytics, Data Studio, Tag Manager, Merchant Center, and Meta Ads Manager to analyze data and drive campaign improvements.
Collaborating with SEOs, writers, and designers on new experiments and client work — contributing to a team that tests, learns, and pushes boundaries daily.




✅ What You'll Need:




1+ year of hands-on Google Ads experience — able to build, manage, and optimize paid search campaigns confidently.
1+ year of Meta Ads experience — proficient in Facebook and Instagram campaign setup, targeting, and optimization inside Ads Manager.
Working knowledge of Google Analytics, Google Data Studio, Google Ads Editor, Google Tag Manager, and Google Merchant Center.
Prior agency experience — you understand client management, reporting, and the pace of agency work.
Detail-oriented, research-driven, and a strong communicator in written and spoken English.
Bonus: automotive vertical experience, OEM reimbursement knowledge, or campaigns you can show us with real results.
To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.




💼 What We Offer:




💸 Competitive salary in USD — paid consistently every month.
🌴 10 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. federal holidays.
💻 100% remote — open to candidates based in LATAM or Europe.
📈 Direct mentorship from top paid media specialists — real room to grow and own your campaigns inside a fast-moving agency.
🏆 A high-performance, collaborative culture where testing, learning, and pushing boundaries are part of daily life.
🤝 A supportive environment through Veta Virtual and our client where curiosity is rewarded and your growth is taken seriously from day one.




Ready to Apply?




If you are ready to run real campaigns, learn from the best, and grow inside one of the most innovative digital marketing agencies in the automotive space — apply now and launch your next chapter with Veta Virtual!




Once you apply, you will complete a short 2-minute video question — come ready to tell us about campaigns you have run and results you have driven. We can't wait to meet you!

description:
About the job

About Puig




At Puig, we are a family-owned company with a long-term commitment to creativity, innovation, and people development. Through our Graduate Program, we are looking for exceptional young talent ready to begin their professional journey in a dynamic, international, and purpose-driven environment.




This is a unique opportunity to accelerate your career, gain exposure to a leading global organization, and contribute to the growth of prestigious dermatological brands that improve people's quality of life through science-backed skincare solutions.




Your Mission




As a Marketing Graduate (Entry Level) within our Derma Division, you will support the Marketing team in the development and execution of brand strategies, product launches, and commercial initiatives while gaining hands-on experience across multiple areas of the business.




You will work closely with cross-functional teams including Medical Affairs, Sales, Trade Marketing, Digital, and Finance, contributing to projects that have a direct impact on business performance and patient outcomes.




What You'll Do




• Support the planning, execution, and optimization of digital marketing campaigns across social media platforms, with a strong focus on TikTok and emerging digital channels.

• Assist in the creation, coordination, and publishing of engaging content aligned with brand strategies, consumer trends, and business objectives.

• Collaborate closely with the Digital & Marketing team to manage community engagement, monitor social conversations, and identify opportunities to increase brand relevance and reach.

• Support influencer and content creator initiatives, including campaign coordination, performance tracking, and reporting.

• Monitor digital KPIs and campaign performance, providing insights and recommendations to improve engagement, visibility, and business impact.

• Contribute to the development and management of a dedicated social media project aimed at healthcare professionals, helping create educational and scientifically relevant content for derma brands.

• Coordinate with Medical Visit and cross-functional teams to ensure content accuracy, compliance, and alignment with brand objectives.

• Assist in the preparation of presentations, reports, and business reviews related to digital performance, marketing initiatives, and key projects.

• Participate in local and global marketing projects, gaining exposure to brand management, consumer engagement, and omnichannel strategies.

• Provide support on ad hoc marketing initiatives, product launches, events, and special projects across the Derma division.




Who You Are

Recent graduate (Bachelor's degree completed within the last 1–2 years) in Marketing, Business Administration, Communication, Pharmaceutical Business, or related fields.
Previous internship, trainee, student leadership, or extracurricular experience is highly valued.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent communication and presentation abilities.
Curious, proactive, and eager to learn.
Collaborative mindset and ability to work in diverse teams.
Passion for marketing, healthcare, skincare, and consumer behavior.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.




Requirements

Bachelor's degree completed by the start date.
Intermediate English proficiency (written and spoken).
Advanced knowledge of Microsoft Office (Excel and PowerPoint preferred).
Availability to work full-time.
Authorization to work in Mexico.




What We Offer

Participation in a global Graduate Program designed to accelerate your development.
Exposure to senior leaders and international projects.
Structured learning and development opportunities.
Mentorship and career guidance.
A collaborative, inclusive, and innovative culture.
Opportunity to build a long-term career within Puig.




Our Commitment

At Puig, we believe that diversity, equity, and inclusion drive innovation and creativity. We are committed to creating an environment where everyone can thrive, contribute, and grow.

Join us and help shape the future of dermatological skincare through science, innovation, and purpose. ✨

title: RSNA Expert - Marketing Specialist
description:
About the job

Position Summary:

We are seeking an experienced Overseas Exhibition Project Manager to oversee the comprehensive management of the entire process for international exhibitions, including the Radiological Society of North America (RSNA) annual meeting. This role will lead exhibition planning, execution, vendor coordination, and client relationship management to ensure optimal brand presentation and participation outcomes at international events. Additionally, this position will serve as a key liaison for the company's digital accounts, collaborating closely with the marketing team to effectively convert offline exhibition traffic into online digital assets.




Position Responsibilities:

1. Exhibition Project Management (RSNA & Overseas Exhibitions)

· Manage the full lifecycle of planning and execution for the RSNA annual meeting and other overseas exhibitions, including booth reservation, exhibit material shipping, construction plan coordination, and on-site services.

· Maintain efficient communication with venues, external suppliers (construction, logistics, service providers) to ensure the smooth execution of all exhibition phases.

· Develop and manage project timelines and quality standards, ensuring critical milestones are met on schedule.

· Oversee on-site operations during exhibitions, including construction supervision, activity execution, and emergency handling.

· Possess thorough knowledge of RSNA rules and regulations to ensure exhibition behavior complies with organizer requirements and mitigates compliance risks.

2. Supplier and Budget Management

· Participate in the tendering, evaluation, and selection process for service suppliers (construction, logistics, PR, etc.), managing the Request for Proposals (RFP) process.

· Prepare and monitor exhibition project budgets, including booth fees, construction costs, shipping, travel expenses, etc., ensuring expenditures stay within budget and identifying cost-saving opportunities.

· Responsible for reviewing, archiving, and ensuring compliance for all exhibition-related contracts.

3. Client Relations and Sales Support

· Maintain efficient communication with exhibitors, providing professional services and on-site support.

· Nurture existing client relationships, identify potential client needs, and assist the sales team with registration and administrative processes.

· Collaborate with the digital marketing team to ensure sales leads generated during exhibitions are effectively entered into the CRM system (e.g., Salesforce) for data integration.

4. Cross-Cultural Communication & International Coordination

· Navigate cross-regional and cross-cultural work environments, building strong collaborative relationships with overseas organizers, service providers, and partners.

· Adapt to overseas travel requirements, leading teams to participate in RSNA and other international exhibitions, providing on-site support and problem-solving.

· Coordinate with internal departments (Marketing, Sales, Product, etc.) to ensure exhibition objectives align with the company's overall strategy.

5. Documentation and Reporting

· Organize, archive, and manage exhibition-related documents, including participation contracts, service agreements, and exhibition materials.

· Regularly prepare comprehensive post-exhibition summary reports, including effectiveness evaluation, ROI analysis, and recommendations for improvement

· Monitor industry trends and exhibition developments, providing data-driven insights and optimization suggestions for the company's exhibition strategy.




Required Skills & Education:

1. Education Background

· Bachelor's degree or above, preferably in International Business, Exhibition Management, Marketing, or a related field.

2. Work Experience

· Minimum 3 years of project management experience specifically with overseas exhibitions, having successfully led the preparation and execution of multiple international events.

· Experience with RSNA or other major medical/professional international exhibitions is highly preferred.

· Experience in domestic and international exhibition organization is preferred.

3. Professional Skills

· Proficient in the full cycle of exhibition project management, including planning, execution, and evaluation.

· Familiar with international trade practices and characteristics of overseas markets, possessing strong negotiation skills.

· Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite and project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Asana).

· Familiarity with CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce) is a plus.

· Experience in financial modeling and budget management is an advantage.

4. Language Ability

· Fluent in English with excellent listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills, capable of using English as a working language for business communication with international partners.

· Overseas work or study background is highly preferred.

5. Core Competencies

· Excellent communication, coordination, and execution skills, capable of building and maintaining strong collaborative relationships across departments and international teams.

· Strong project and time management skills, able to handle multiple tasks and emergencies simultaneously.

· High sense of responsibility and strong ability to work under pressure, adaptable to overseas travel and the high-intensity pace of exhibition work.

· Strong learning agility and market insight, capable of quickly grasping industry dynamics.

· Customer-oriented mindset with attention to detail and a pursuit of excellence in the industry’s exhibition experience.




Carestream is an Equal Opportunity Employer

Carestream is an equal opportunity organization. We recruit, employ, train, compensate, and promote withoutregard to race, religion, creed, color, national origin, age, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status,disability, veteran status, or any other basis protected by applicable federal, state or local law.

Applying for a job with Carestream

All applicants must complete the on-line application process.

title: Content & SEO Specialist
skills: Eligibility: This position is open to candidates residing in Latin America.
Application Language: Please submit your CV in English. Applications submitted in other languages will not be considered.

Interview Policy: The use of artificial intelligence (AI) tools during interviews are strictly prohibited.

Note: As part of the final stages of our hiring process, candidates may be asked to provide professional references for a reference check. If hired, you may also be asked to update your LinkedIn profile :)
AI-Assisted Blog Content → CMS Publishing
Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to generate first drafts from content briefs and keywords
Rewrite and refine AI output so it reads natural, human, and brand-consistent
Fact-check, improve clarity, and ensure editorial quality (no “AI-sounding” content)
Publish 2–4 blog posts per week into a CMS (proper formatting: H1/H2/H3, meta title, meta description, slug)
Source and integrate relevant visuals for every post (hero images, diagrams, screenshots where relevant)
Ensure images are contextually relevant, correctly sized, and include alt text
Add internal links following the hub-and-spoke structure

Maintain tracking in the content calendar (status, publish date, URL, performance notes)
Weekly Newsletter

Curate 2–3 external insights (industry news, posts, tools, studies)
Write concise commentary and framing around each item
Include links to newly published content
Maintain a clear, non-promotional tone focused on value and relevance
Schedule, test, and send each issue
Monitor open and click-through rates weekly and flag performance trends
LinkedIn Content (1–2 Posts Weekly)
Write 1–2 posts per week for a company LinkedIn page
Avoid generic “corporate thought leadership” tone — keep it specific, practical, and grounded
Pull insights from blog content, product use cases, customer conversations, or sales insights
Create or source supporting visuals (screenshots, simple graphics, text-based visuals)

Monitor engagement and flag important comments or mentions for response
Template Pages & Gated Content

Format templates into usable assets (PDF, Slides, or Docs)
Publish gated landing pages in CMS with email capture integration
Ensure proper metadata, internal linking, and conversion flow
Maintain consistency between page copy and downloadable asset
Strong experience using AI writing tools effectively (knows the difference between edited output and raw AI content)
Ability to write clearly, directly, and without corporate or filler language
Experience publishing content in a CMS environment
Strong organizational skills and ability to manage workload independently
Ability to source relevant, context-aware visuals
Comfortable receiving editorial feedback and iterating quickly
Experience with CMS platforms (e.g., Webflow or similar)
Email marketing experience
Basic SEO understanding (metadata, structure, internal linking)
Experience writing for B2B audiences (sales, revenue, or SaaS context)
Familiarity with CRM ecosystems
Experience with LinkedIn content creation and distribution
description:
About the job

Hi there! We are South and our client is looking for a Content & SEO Specialist!

Note To Applicants


Eligibility: This position is open to candidates residing in Latin America. 
Application Language: Please submit your CV in English. Applications submitted in other languages will not be considered. 
Professional Presentation: We encourage you to showcase your professional experience by including a Loom video in the application form. While this is optional, candidates who provide a video presentation will be given priority. 
Interview Policy: The use of artificial intelligence (AI) tools during interviews are strictly prohibited. 
Note: As part of the final stages of our hiring process, candidates may be asked to provide professional references for a reference check. If hired, you may also be asked to update your LinkedIn profile :)


The Core Job (Non-Negotiable)

These Four Areas Define Success In This Role


 AI-Assisted Blog Content → CMS Publishing


You will execute a structured content strategy that includes keyword research, content briefs, and a hub-and-spoke architecture already in place.

Your responsibility is to turn briefs into high-quality, published content.


Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to generate first drafts from content briefs and keywords
Rewrite and refine AI output so it reads natural, human, and brand-consistent
Fact-check, improve clarity, and ensure editorial quality (no “AI-sounding” content)
Publish 2–4 blog posts per week into a CMS (proper formatting: H1/H2/H3, meta title, meta description, slug)
Source and integrate relevant visuals for every post (hero images, diagrams, screenshots where relevant)
Ensure images are contextually relevant, correctly sized, and include alt text
Add internal links following the hub-and-spoke structure
Implement FAQ schema markup where applicable (training provided)
Maintain tracking in the content calendar (status, publish date, URL, performance notes)
 Weekly Newsletter


Own a weekly email newsletter sent to a B2B audience (sales and revenue professionals).


Draft one newsletter per week in an email platform (e.g., Klaviyo or equivalent)
Curate 2–3 external insights (industry news, posts, tools, studies)
Write concise commentary and framing around each item
Include links to newly published content
Maintain a clear, non-promotional tone focused on value and relevance
Schedule, test, and send each issue
Monitor open and click-through rates weekly and flag performance trends
 LinkedIn Content (1–2 Posts Weekly)


Manage consistent organic presence on LinkedIn.


Write 1–2 posts per week for a company LinkedIn page
Avoid generic “corporate thought leadership” tone — keep it specific, practical, and grounded
Pull insights from blog content, product use cases, customer conversations, or sales insights
Create or source supporting visuals (screenshots, simple graphics, text-based visuals)
Schedule posts using a social scheduling tool or native platform
Monitor engagement and flag important comments or mentions for response
 Template Pages & Gated Content


Build and publish downloadable, conversion-focused content assets.


Write landing page copy for template downloads (based on provided briefs)
Format templates into usable assets (PDF, Slides, or Docs)
Publish gated landing pages in CMS with email capture integration
Ensure proper metadata, internal linking, and conversion flow
Maintain consistency between page copy and downloadable asset


Who This Role Is For

This role is for someone who is highly proficient in AI-assisted content production and can maintain quality at volume.

Required Skills


Strong experience using AI writing tools effectively (knows the difference between edited output and raw AI content)
Ability to write clearly, directly, and without corporate or filler language
Experience publishing content in a CMS environment
Strong organizational skills and ability to manage workload independently
Ability to source relevant, context-aware visuals
Comfortable receiving editorial feedback and iterating quickly


Strong Plus


Experience with CMS platforms (e.g., Webflow or similar)
Email marketing experience
Basic SEO understanding (metadata, structure, internal linking)
Experience writing for B2B audiences (sales, revenue, or SaaS context)
Familiarity with CRM ecosystems
Experience with LinkedIn content creation and distribution


Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM ET

Compensation: USD salary

Location: 100% remote opportunity

If this opportunity sounds good to you, send us your resume!

title: Volunteer Marketing and Communications Lead to Connect Stakeholders Working to End Deep Polarization with Colombia Construye Confianza
description:
About the job

This is an opportunity to work with an Ashoka Fellow 

Ashoka Fellows are leading social entrepreneurs that have been taken through a rigorous selection process, testing the quality of their ideas and character, to become part of the Ashoka Fellowship and Network. Ashoka Fellows take on the challenges of building innovative system change ideas to make and spread social impact in a world wrought with challenges. They refuse to let the ‘impossible’ stand in their way to creating a better world.

This is an unpaid, volunteer opportunity

About The Affiliated Organization

Colombia Construye Confianza (CCC) was founded to address one of Colombia's most urgent social challenges: deep polarization among citizens who have lost the ability to trust one another. We work with communities, organizations, and institutions to transform the way people relate, building the social trust that democracy and coexistence require. Our flagship methodology, BAKONDO, has reached over 3,200 people over more than 20 years, earning recognition from the World Economic Forum, Coca-Cola, and One Young World. Through experiential education, play, and art, we bring together volunteers and vulnerable communities to form empathetic leaders. Our most powerful program, BAKONDO Paz, unites ex-combatants, victims of the armed conflict, and social leaders to run a camp for children in vulnerable situations, turning former adversaries into builders of peace.

For more information, please visit www.colombiaconstruyeconfianza.org

Job Description

Colombia Construye Confianza is seeking a strategic marketing volunteer to help us design and deploy a comprehensive communications strategy that connects us with all our key stakeholders. We recently developed our brand concept and initial materials with a creative agency, and now need someone to take that foundation and turn it into an active, results-driven marketing operation. The volunteer will design the overall communications and marketing strategy for CCC and its initiatives, including our BAKONDO bootcamps. They will define the right channels, messages, and tactics to attract volunteers, corporate partners, donors, universities, and impact investors. They will also help manage and optimize our social media presence across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp, and support the team in executing campaigns consistently. Their work will directly determine how many people discover, trust, and join our mission, making it essential to the growth and sustainability of the organization. Please let us know today if you can help!

Volunteer Logistics

Estimated hours required per week: 5

The estimated duration of the project is: 3-6 months

This position is Virtual (Remote)

Language Requirements

Spanish

Desired Skills And Experience

We are looking for a professional with demonstrated experience in marketing strategy and digital communications, ideally within the social impact, NGO, or purpose-driven brand space. The ideal candidate has strong skills in content strategy, social media management, and audience segmentation, and knows how to translate a compelling mission into messages that move people to act. Experience working with multiple stakeholder audiences (corporate, institutional, and grassroots) is highly valued. Proficiency in Spanish is required; English is a plus. A background in impact communications, social entrepreneurship, or international development will help the volunteer hit the ground running.

title: Marketing Specialist
skills: Digital Marketing Strategy: Develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies aimed at first responder agencies and healthcare professionals.
Content Creation: Craft compelling content including blog posts, newsletters, and social media updates that resonate with our target audience.
SEO Management: Optimize website content for search engines to enhance visibility for relevant keywords related to mental health services for first responders.
Social Media Engagement: Manage social media platforms, creating engaging posts that drive awareness and interaction among followers.
Analytics and Reporting: Analyze marketing performance metrics to assess the effectiveness of campaigns and suggest improvements.
Audience Segmentation: Identify and segment target audiences to tailor messaging specifically for different groups, including agencies and individual first responders.
Networking and Outreach: Develop relationships with potential referral sources, including healthcare providers and first responder agencies, to expand our reach.
Collaboration: Work closely with our team to align marketing efforts with overall practice goals and client needs.
Experience: Minimum 2+ years of experience marketing for American-based companies (Healthcare or Service Industry preferred).
Technical Savvy: Current with modern marketing technologies and social media algorithms; ability to use AI tools to optimize workflow (but not rely on them for core creativity).
Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills. While primarily a creative role, you must be comfortable making occasional outbound "warm" contacts to build referral relationships.
Mindset: A "shark" mentality—proactive, aggressive in pursuing visibility, and capable of working without constant micromanagement.
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field is highly preferred.
Monitoring Tools: Open to using monitoring tools like Hubstaff.

We are currently at a pivotal growth phase and are looking for a proactive, tech-savvy marketing professional to help us overcome our current financial bottleneck and scale our team of clinicians.




About the Role:

Our Client is seeking a high-energy Marketing Specialist (Virtual Assistant). This is not a passive task-taking role; they need a strategic thinker who understands the American healthcare landscape and can proactively drive lead generation. You will be responsible for translating the clinical expertise of the Client into a digital presence that attracts the "right fit" clients—specifically those seeking therapy and testing rather than medication management.




Key Responsibilities

Digital Marketing Strategy: Develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies aimed at first responder agencies and healthcare professionals.
Content Creation: Craft compelling content including blog posts, newsletters, and social media updates that resonate with our target audience.

title: Email Marketing Account Manager
skills: You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent
Minh Vo - Founder
description:
About the job

I’m helping Email Clout find a top candidate to join their team flexible for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager.




You'll drive revenue and client success by independently managing end-to-end email marketing campaigns.




Compensation:

USD 300 - 1.5K/month




Location:

Remote: Mexico




Mission of Email Clout:

"Empower online brands with high-impact, revenue-driving email campaigns. Fast, accountable, and world-class results."




What makes you a strong candidate:

You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent




Responsibilities and more:

Email Clout is an email marketing agency that partners with online brands to create unique, engaging, and revenue-generating email campaigns and flows. We’re fully remote, small, and love to move fast. We hold ourselves accountable for delivering a world-class client experience and industry-shattering email performance. 




We are looking for the ideal candidate for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager, who will be responsible for the experience and performance of client accounts. In this role, you will manage and execute email marketing campaigns and flows from start to finish. This includes coming up with ideas, planning, writing copy, communicating with clients and internal teams, as well as implementation in Klaviyo. You will use Klaviyo and Figma while managing your tasks independently through Notion. Below are the key responsibilities for this role. 




- Create and manage multiple email content calendars. 

- Plan, write, and schedule email marketing campaigns and flows. 

- Collect, report, present, and analyze past data to make the best decisions for clients. 

- Conduct and lead client calls. 

- Handle difficult questions related to email performance. 

- Make design and copy changes in Figma. 

- Collaborate and manage designers and copywriters. 

- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in email marketing. 




Software stack you’ll be using: 

- Slack 

- Klaviyo 

- Figma 

- Shopify 

- Notion 




Requirements: 

- 1-2 years of experience in email marketing, preferably with experience using Klaviyo. 

- Proficiency in Figma or similar design software. 

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 

- Strong attention to detail and multitasking ability. 

- Familiarity with email marketing best practices and metrics. 

- Confident in communicating with clients. 

- Perfect English (spoken and written). 




Do Not Apply If: 

- You’re okay with delays or errors in client work. 

- You’re willing to work only during regular hours. 

- You can only write when assisted by ChatGPT. 

- You don’t take deadlines seriously. 

- You lack urgency in completing work. 

- You don’t have the resourcefulness to solve problems on your own first. 

- You don’t feel confident in your email marketing abilities.




Your potential leader(s):

Minh Vo - Founder



Desired Skills and Experience

Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting, Client communication, Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma

title: Online Data Analyst | Remote in Mexico
description:
About the job

¿Eres una persona orientada a los detalles con pasión por la investigación y una buena comprensión de la geografía nacional y local? Esta oportunidad de trabajo independiente te permite trabajar a tu propio ritmo y desde la comodidad de tu hogar.




Un Día en la Vida de un Analista de Datos en Línea:

En este rol, trabajarás en un proyecto destinado a mejorar el contenido y la calidad de los mapas digitales que utilizan millones de personas en todo el mundo. Completar tareas de investigación y evaluación en un entorno basado en web, como verificar y comparar datos, y determinar la relevancia y precisión de la información.

¡Únete a nosotros hoy y sé parte de un equipo dinámico e innovador que está marcando la diferencia en el mundo!




TELUS Digital AI Community

Nuestra Comunidad Global de IA es una red vibrante de más de 1 millón de colaboradores de diversos orígenes que ayudan a nuestros clientes a recopilar, mejorar, entrenar, traducir y localizar contenido para construir mejores modelos de IA. Conviértete en parte de nuestra comunidad en crecimiento y haz un impacto apoyando los modelos de aprendizaje automático de algunas de las marcas más grandes del mundo.




Ruta de Calificación

No se requiere experiencia profesional previa para solicitar este rol; sin embargo, trabajar en este proyecto requerirá que pases los requisitos básicos y pases por un proceso de evaluación estándar. Este es un proyecto a tiempo parcial a largo plazo y tu trabajo estará sujeto a nuestras verificaciones estándar de control de calidad durante el término de este acuerdo.




Requisitos Básicos

Dominio Profesional Completo del inglés y español. Ser residente en México durante los últimos 5 años consecutivos y tener familiaridad con los asuntos comerciales, mediáticos, deportivos, de noticias, redes sociales y culturales actuales e históricos de México. Capacidad para seguir directrices y realizar investigaciones en línea utilizando motores de búsqueda, mapas en línea e información de sitios web. Flexibilidad para trabajar en una diversa gama de tipos de tareas, incluidos mapas, noticias, tareas de audio y relevancia Acceso diario a una conexión internet, computadora y software relevante.




Evaluación Para ser contratado en el programa: deberás realizar una evaluación técnica a libro abierto para validar tu perfil para el puesto, además de completar el proceso de verificación de identidad. Nuestro equipo te proporcionará directrices y materiales de aprendizaje antes de tu examen de calificación. Se te requerirá completar el examen en un plazo específico pero a tu conveniencia.




Igualdad de oportunidades: La selección de nuestros colaboradores se basa únicamente en las aptitudes profesionales. Garantizamos un proceso equitativo para todos los solicitantes, sin importar su raza, creencias, identidad, orientación sexual o capacidades diferentes.. En TELUS Digital AI, nos enorgullece ofrecer igualdad de oportunidades y estamos comprometidos con la creación de una comunidad diversa e inclusiva. Todos los aspectos de la selección se basan en las calificaciones, méritos, competencia y desempeño de los solicitantes sin importar ninguna característica relacionada con la diversidad.

description:
About the job

Rockwell Automation is a global technology leader focused on helping the world’s manufacturers be more productive, sustainable, and agile. With more than 28,000 employees who make the world better every day, we know we have something special. Behind our customers - amazing companies that help feed the world, provide life-saving medicine on a global scale, and focus on clean water and green mobility - our people are energized problem solvers that take pride in how the work we do changes the world for the better.

We welcome all makers, forward thinkers, and problem solvers who are looking for a place to do their best work. And if that’s you we would love to have you join us!

Job Description

Fiix is looking for a Paid Media Specialist to join our marketing team and help scale efficient, measurable pipeline through the best paid acquisition. Reporting into the demand generation function, you will manage daily execution and optimization of our paid programs across search and social. You will partner with multiple teams, including Marketing Ops, Analytics, Content/Creative, Web, Sales Development, and Revenue Ops. The goal of these efforts is to ensure our campaigns guide the right conversions, and those conversions are measured through to pipeline and ARR.

You will report to the Senior Manager, Marketing.

Main Responsabilities


Manage performance across paid channels. Manage and improve paid search and paid social programs (always-on and campaigns), including keyword / audience strategy, bidding, budgets, and ad structure.
Increase revenue outcomes, not just leads. Align conversion strategy to funnel stages (MQLs, SQLs, SAOs and pipeline), partnering with stakeholders including sales and marketing to improve quality and acceptance rules.
Run a disciplined testing roadmap. Launch structured experiments across creative, messaging, landing pages, audience segments, bidding strategies, and offers – documenting insights and scaling winners.
Increased conversion rate through a full funnel journey. Partner with the web/UX and content teams to improve landing page relevance, speed, form performance, and post-click experience.
Build repeatable governance. Build campaign QA, naming conventions, change logs, budgets, pacing, and weekly performance reviews; surface risks/opportunities.
Product clear performance insights. Deliver weekly / monthly reporting with applicable insights for marketing leadership and team members.
Partner in planning. Support quarterly and monthly planning – forecasting performance, proposing budget allocations, and aligning channel strategy to GTM priorities (segments, regions, products, and verticals)


The Essentials – You Will Have


Bachelor's Degree in relevant field
Advanced English


The Preferred – You Might Also Have


You have 5+ years of experience.
Experience developing, delivering, and enabling product marketing programs cross-functionally
Understanding of marketing at all stages of the B2B customer journey and SaaS product lifecycle
A collaborative self- starter who is comfortable being hands-on with implementation of programs
Product oriented - with the ability and curiosity to understand and learn about features and a technology platform.
Discipline to follow established standards and processes


What We Offer


Comprehensive mindfulness programs with a premium membership to Calm
Volunteer Paid Time off available after 6 months of employment for eligible employees
Company volunteer and donation matching program – We match your volunteer hours or personal cash donations to an eligible charity with a charitable donation.
Employee Assistance Program
Personalized wellbeing programs through our OnTrack program
On-demand digital course library for professional development.


We believe that employee diversity is an important element of our common future. We provide opportunities for talent growth with the entire organization. We support equality by celebrating the individuality of every person, regardless of their origin and identity. We appreciate the unique cultural pattern and variety of experiences in each of us. We invite all who want to join and change the world of our organization.

Rockwell Automation’s hybrid policy aligns that employees are expected to work at a Rockwell location at least Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays unless they have a business obligation out of the office.

We are looking for fluent language professionals to help train and evaluate AI language models. This is a flexible, part-time contract role you can do entirely from home, on your own schedule. If you work with language professionally - as a writer, teacher, translator, tutor, linguist, or language specialist - this role is a strong fit.




What You'll Do

Read and evaluate AI-generated text for quality, accuracy, and fluency
Write short prompts and creative responses to help train AI systems
Rank and compare AI outputs based on clear evaluation criteria
Provide written feedback on language quality




What We're Looking For

Fluency in your language and English
Bachelor's degree or higher, preferably in a humanities, language, or writing-related field
Professional experience working with language - writing, teaching, translating, editing, annotating, or related fields
Strong attention to detail and ability to follow evaluation guidelines
Background in linguistics, academic writing, data annotation, or AI content evaluation is a plus




What You Get

Up to $7.50 USD/hr, paid weekly
Fully remote - work from anywhere
Flexible hours - you set your own schedule
Part-time contract - ideal as a primary or supplemental income source




Equal Opportunity Employer:

We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.

description:
About the job

Rockwell Automation is a global technology leader focused on helping the world’s manufacturers be more productive, sustainable, and agile. With more than 28,000 employees who make the world better every day, we know we have something special. Behind our customers - amazing companies that help feed the world, provide life-saving medicine on a global scale, and focus on clean water and green mobility - our people are energized problem solvers that take pride in how the work we do changes the world for the better.

We welcome all makers, forward thinkers, and problem solvers who are looking for a place to do their best work. And if that’s you we would love to have you join us!

Job Description

You will strengthen revenue impact by managing the product marketing work that directly improves win rates and launch success. You will lead and scale our win/loss program, systematically capturing why we're deals and why we're not. Then, they will package those insights into clear, relevant guidelines for sales, product, demand generation, and leadership. You will guide competitor analysis and battle cards to sharpen difference in active deals. You will work with external partners to align joint positioning and co-marketing motions. You will manage end-to-end product launches with the right narratives, enablement, and assets.

You will report to the Senior Manager, Marketing.

Main Responsibilities


Support the execution and enablement of release to market plans and deliverables. This involves a SaaS deployment model, including product release communications, content, and reporting. These elements span the customer journey and product lifecycle, comprising emails, in-app notifications, release updates, FAQs, web and community content, product and roadmap webinars/videos.
Market Research involves collecting and compiling intelligence from multiple sources. These sources include market, competitive, industry analyst, customer (VoC), and win/loss data. This compiled intelligence informs corporate and product strategy, and target market and ideal customer profile definition.
Enablement enables teams across the organization, including sales. It achieves this by communicating the target market, personas, value proposition. Additionally, it involves building enablement and education tools. These tools support a sales motion and organizational "everboarding". You include presentations, videos, talk tracks, battle cards, demos, and internal FAQs.
Global Expansion - Orchestration of localization related activities and assets including management of translations and regional enablement
Product Content Development involves preparing and updating product marketing materials. These materials include solution and industry-based content, as well as analyst briefing content, partner and integration materials, marchitecture diagrams, and technical documentation. Technical documentation encompasses RFP sections, architecture and security documents, and more.
Support a range of product marketing programs and activities with a desire to gain broad experience in the function!


The Essentials – You Will Have


Bachelor's Degree in relevant field.
Advanced English


The Preferred – You Might Also Have


8 years' experience in B2B software/SaaS product marketing
Experience developing product marketing programs cross-functionally
Understanding of marketing at all stages of the B2B customer journey and SaaS product lifecycle
A collaborative self- starter who is comfortable being hands-on with implementation of programs
Product oriented - with an ability and curiosity to understand and learn about features and a technology platform
Discipline to follow established standards and processes - project management example is critical
Marketing Certified (PMC)
Project Management Professional (PMP) certification


What We Offer


Comprehensive mindfulness programs with a premium membership to Calm
Volunteer Paid Time off available after 6 months of employment for eligible employees
Company volunteer and donation matching program – We match your volunteer hours or personal cash donations to an eligible charity with a charitable donation.
Employee Assistance Program
Personalized wellbeing programs through our OnTrack program
On-demand digital course library for professional development.


We believe that employee diversity is an important element of our common future. We provide opportunities for talent growth with the entire organization. We support equality by celebrating the individuality of every person, regardless of their origin and identity. We appreciate the unique cultural pattern and variety of experiences in each of us. We invite all who want to join and change the world of our organization.

Rockwell Automation’s hybrid policy aligns that employees are expected to work at a Rockwell location at least Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays unless they have a business obligation out of the office.

title: AI Lead and Growth Operations
description:
About the job

Job Title: AI Lead and Growth operations

Location: Remote (Latin America)

Job Type: PART-Time (10-15 hours a week) as an Independent Contractor (compensation in USD)

Time zone: EST (US hours)




Position Overview

Build a predictable, measurable, AI-powered revenue generation engine. This is a "builder" role

focused on creating the systems, automations, and operating infrastructure to drive growth.




Key Responsibilities

● Revenue Operations: Design and optimize CRM infrastructure, build KPI dashboards, and create visibility into pipeline health.

● Speaking Pipeline: Build an automated sourcing engine for speaking opportunities, systematize applications, and create outreach workflows.

● AI and Automation: Build workflows using AI and automation platforms to eliminate manual work and document SOPs.

● Operational Rhythm: Create systems for consistent follow-up, nurturing, and weekly revenue reporting.




Required Experience

● Operations: 3+ years in RevOps or growth operations.

● Systems Proficiency: Hands-on experience with CRM systems and automation platforms.

● Proficiency in using AI for workflow design and automation.

● Strategic Design: Experience in dashboard creation, KPI development, and outbound

prospecting system design.

● Professional-level and bilingual proficiency in English and Spanish.




Candidate Profile

● Entrepreneurial & Autonomous: Independent problem-solver who takes initiative

without constant supervision.

● Data-Driven: Makes decisions based on evidence and tracks performance metrics.

● AI-Native: Instinctively seeks to automate and improve processes using technology.

● Radical Candor: Provides direct, honest feedback to improve the business.

title: SEO Specialist
skills: Drive organic growth across multiple client websites through on-page SEO, technical optimization, keyword strategy, and site structure improvements.
Conduct in-depth keyword research, competitor analysis, and SEO audits to identify growth opportunities and technical issues.
Analyze performance data using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, and Google Business Profile to generate actionable insights.
Develop and implement internal linking strategies, resolve keyword cannibalization issues, and optimize content architecture.
Design and execute Local SEO strategies, including Google Maps optimization and visibility improvements across local and AI-driven search surfaces.
Collaborate with writers, designers, developers, and SEO peers to test new ideas, improve deliverables, and optimize campaign performance.
Work directly with clients to understand business goals, communicate SEO insights clearly, and translate requirements into effective strategies.
Continuously test new SEO approaches, evaluate algorithm updates, and contribute insights that improve overall team performance.
Stay up to date with industry trends, attend webinars or conferences, and proactively bring new learnings into client strategies.
3+ years of hands-on SEO experience with proven results in improving rankings and organic traffic.
At least 2 years of experience in a client-facing SEO role within an agency environment.
Strong proficiency with SEO and analytics tools including Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Business Profile.
Solid working knowledge of tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, or similar platforms.
Proven ability to design and execute both short-term and long-term SEO strategies that balance quick wins and sustainable growth.
Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data, identify patterns, and adapt strategies under algorithm changes.
Ability to manage multiple client accounts independently in a fast-paced, fully remote environment.
Excellent communication skills with the ability to simplify complex SEO concepts for clients and stakeholders.
Experience with WordPress or other CMS platforms and basic understanding of HTML/CSS is a plus.
Exposure to digital PR, link building, or off-site SEO strategies is a strong advantage.
Experience in automotive SEO, local SEO, or multi-location businesses is considered a plus.
Bonus: Experience building and growing your own website with measurable SEO results.
Competitive salary paid in USD on a consistent monthly basis.
Fully remote role with flexibility to work from anywhere in Latin America or Europe.
10 paid vacation days annually plus U.S. federal holidays.
High level of ownership over SEO strategy and execution with freedom to test and innovate.
Collaborative, high-performance agency culture focused on experimentation and continuous improvement.
Access to SEO conferences, webinars, and ongoing professional development opportunities.
Supportive environment with strong mentorship and clear growth pathways.
Opportunity to work on impactful, real-world SEO projects in a specialized automotive niche.
Culture that values curiosity, data-driven decisions, and measurable results.
description:
About the job

This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a SEO Specialist based in Mexico.

As an SEO Specialist, you will take full ownership of organic search performance for a portfolio of high-growth automotive clients in a fully remote, performance-driven environment. This role goes beyond execution — it is designed for someone who thinks strategically, experiments continuously, and uses data to drive real ranking improvements. You will work closely with cross-functional teams including content creators, designers, and developers to deliver measurable SEO impact across multiple websites. Your work will directly influence organic traffic growth, local search visibility, and long-term digital performance. The environment encourages curiosity, testing, and evidence-based decision-making, where ideas are valued based on results rather than assumptions. This is an opportunity to shape SEO strategy end-to-end while working in a collaborative, fast-moving agency setting focused on real outcomes.

Accountabilities


Drive organic growth across multiple client websites through on-page SEO, technical optimization, keyword strategy, and site structure improvements.
Conduct in-depth keyword research, competitor analysis, and SEO audits to identify growth opportunities and technical issues.
Analyze performance data using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, and Google Business Profile to generate actionable insights.
Develop and implement internal linking strategies, resolve keyword cannibalization issues, and optimize content architecture.
Design and execute Local SEO strategies, including Google Maps optimization and visibility improvements across local and AI-driven search surfaces.
Collaborate with writers, designers, developers, and SEO peers to test new ideas, improve deliverables, and optimize campaign performance.
Work directly with clients to understand business goals, communicate SEO insights clearly, and translate requirements into effective strategies.
Continuously test new SEO approaches, evaluate algorithm updates, and contribute insights that improve overall team performance.
Stay up to date with industry trends, attend webinars or conferences, and proactively bring new learnings into client strategies.


Requirements


3+ years of hands-on SEO experience with proven results in improving rankings and organic traffic.
At least 2 years of experience in a client-facing SEO role within an agency environment.
Strong proficiency with SEO and analytics tools including Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Business Profile.
Solid working knowledge of tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, or similar platforms.
Proven ability to design and execute both short-term and long-term SEO strategies that balance quick wins and sustainable growth.
Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data, identify patterns, and adapt strategies under algorithm changes.
Ability to manage multiple client accounts independently in a fast-paced, fully remote environment.
Excellent communication skills with the ability to simplify complex SEO concepts for clients and stakeholders.
Experience with WordPress or other CMS platforms and basic understanding of HTML/CSS is a plus.
Exposure to digital PR, link building, or off-site SEO strategies is a strong advantage.
Experience in automotive SEO, local SEO, or multi-location businesses is considered a plus.
Bonus: Experience building and growing your own website with measurable SEO results.


Benefits


Competitive salary paid in USD on a consistent monthly basis.
Fully remote role with flexibility to work from anywhere in Latin America or Europe.
10 paid vacation days annually plus U.S. federal holidays.
High level of ownership over SEO strategy and execution with freedom to test and innovate.
Collaborative, high-performance agency culture focused on experimentation and continuous improvement.
Access to SEO conferences, webinars, and ongoing professional development opportunities.
Supportive environment with strong mentorship and clear growth pathways.
Opportunity to work on impactful, real-world SEO projects in a specialized automotive niche.
Culture that values curiosity, data-driven decisions, and measurable results.


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Modelo de Trabalho Híbrido: Adotamos um ambiente de trabalho híbrido e flexível (2-3 dias por semana no escritório, dependendo do papel) para funções baseadas em escritório, garantindo uma experiência integrada e coerente tanto no âmbito digital quanto presencial.

Flexibilidade e Equilíbrio entre Trabalho e Vida Pessoal: ""Flex My Way"" consiste em um conjunto de políticas de projetadas para facilitar a gestão das responsabilidades pessoais e profissionais, seja cuidando da família, participando de atividades comunitárias ou dedicando tempo para descanso e renovação pessoal. Essas políticas se baseiam em nossa abordagem flexível de trabalho, permitindo que os funcionários trabalhem de qualquer lugar por até 8 semanas por ano, promovendo assim um equilíbrio ideal entre seus compromissos de trabalho e pessoais.

Desenvolvimento e Crescimento Profissional: Promovemos uma cultura de aprendizado contínuo e desenvolvimento de habilidades, preparando nossos talentos para enfrentar os desafios do futuro e oferecer soluções reais. Nosso programa ""Grow My Way"" e a abordagem focada em habilidades garantem que você tenha as ferramentas e conhecimentos para crescer, liderar e prosperar em um futuro habilitado pela inteligência artificial.

Benefícios Competitivos do Setor: Oferecemos planos de benefícios abrangentes que incluem assistência médica e odontológica, dois dias de feriado corporativo para saúde mental, programas de incentivo por performance e recursos para o bem-estar mental, físico e financeiro.

Cultura: Reconhecida globalmente por inclusão e pertencimento, flexibilidade, equilíbrio entre trabalho e vida pessoal. Vivemos nossos valores: obsessão pelos nossos clientes, competir para ganhar, desafiar o (seu) nosso pensamento, agir rápido e aprender rápido e juntos somos mais fortes.

Impacto Social: Gere um impacto em sua comunidade com nosso Instituto de Impacto Social. Oferecemos a todos colaboradores dois dias de voluntariado pagos anualmente e oportunidades para se envolver em projetos de consultoria pro bono e iniciativas de Meio Ambiente, Sociais e de Governança (ESG).

Fazendo um Impacto Real no Mundo: Somos uma das poucas empresas globalmente que auxilia seus clientes na busca por justiça, verdade e transparência. Trabalhando em conjunto com os profissionais e instituições que servimos, contribuímos para sustentar o estado de direito, fomentar o comércio, detectar infratores, relatar os fatos e oferecer informações confiáveis e imparciais para pessoas em todo o mundo.

Flexibilidade e Equilíbrio entre Trabalho e Vida Pessoal: ""Flex My Way"" consiste em um conjunto de políticas de projetadas para facilitar a gestão das responsabilidades pessoais e profissionais, seja cuidando da família, participando de atividades comunitárias ou dedicando tempo para descanso e renovação pessoal. Desenvolvimento e Crescimento Profissional: Promovemos uma cultura de aprendizado contínuo e desenvolvimento de habilidades, preparando nossos talentos para enfrentar os desafios do futuro e oferecer soluções reais. Benefícios Competitivos do Setor: Oferecemos planos de benefícios abrangentes que incluem assistência médica e odontológica, dois dias de feriado corporativo para saúde mental, programas de incentivo por performance e recursos para o bem-estar mental, físico e financeiro. 
Cultura: Reconhecida globalmente por inclusão e pertencimento, flexibilidade, equilíbrio entre trabalho e vida pessoal. Vivemos nossos valores: obsessão pelos nossos clientes, competir para ganhar, desafiar o (seu) nosso pensamento, agir rápido e aprender rápido e juntos somos mais fortes. 
Impacto Social: Gere um impacto em sua comunidade com nosso Instituto de Impacto Social. Oferecemos a todos colaboradores dois dias de voluntariado pagos anualmente e oportunidades para se envolver em projetos de consultoria pro bono e iniciativas de Meio Ambiente, Sociais e de Governança (ESG). 
Fazendo um Impacto Real no Mundo: Somos uma das poucas empresas globalmente que auxilia seus clientes na busca por justiça, verdade e transparência. Trabalhando em conjunto com os profissionais e instituições que servimos, contribuímos para sustentar o estado de direito, fomentar o comércio, detectar infratores, relatar os fatos e oferecer informações confiáveis e imparciais para pessoas em todo o mundo.


Quem somos 

A Thomson Reuters informa o caminho adiante ao reunir conteúdo confiável e a tecnologia que pessoas e organizações precisam para tomar decisões corretas. Servimos profissionais nos setores jurídico, fiscal, contábil, de conformidade, governamental e de mídia. Nossos produtos combinam software altamente especializado e informações para capacitar profissionais com os dados, inteligência e soluções necessárias para tomar decisões informadas e ajudar as instituições em sua busca por justiça, verdade e transparência. A agência de notícias Reuters, parte da Thomson Reuters, é líder mundial na área de jornalismo e notícias confiáveis.

Contamos com o talento de 26.000 colaboradores em mais de 70 países, onde todos têm a oportunidade de contribuir e crescer profissionalmente em ambientes de trabalho flexíveis. Em um momento em que objetividade, precisão, equidade e transparência estão sob ataque, estamos comprometidos em buscá-los. Ficou interessado? Faça parte da nossa equipe e contribua para moldar as indústrias que impulsionam o progresso da sociedade.

Como uma empresa global, confiamos no conhecimento único, perspectivas e experiências de todos os colaboradores para cumprir nossos objetivos comerciais. Para garantir que possamos fazer isso, buscamos colaboradores talentosos e qualificados em todas as nossas operações ao redor do mundo, independentemente de raça, cor, sexo/gênero, incluindo gestantes, identidade e expressão de gênero, origem nacional, religião, orientação afetivo-sexual, deficiência, idade, estado civil, status de cidadania, ou outra classificação protegida pela lei aplicável.

Além disso, oferecemos acessibilidade para pessoas com deficiências e para aquelas com crenças religiosas sinceras, conforme a legislação vigente. Você pode encontrar mais informações sobre como solicitar uma adaptação aqui.

Descubra como se proteger de anúncios de emprego fraudulentos aqui. Para obter mais informações sobre a Thomson Reuters, visite nosso site em thomsonreuters.com

title: Marketing Technologist, Data Enablement
skills: Play a key role in configuration, integration and operations of marketing systems including Marketing Analytics Platform to help with automating data ingestion pipelines, building taxonomy tools, datasets for end to end Marketing Campaign performance and reporting.

This role is a combination of hands-on-keyboards(Manage marketing systems integrations, data ingestion, and built ETLs to prepare analytics datasets) AND program management (work with various teams to align on roadmaps for collecting, testing and preparing both third party and own data).

Coordinating with other dev dependencies to align cross-tech team sprint schedules & release plans.
Documents and maintains standard/efficient processes, automating as much as possible.
Enable cross-team testing scenarios.
You have 3+ years of experience in Engineering, Analytics, Tech. Operations, Marketing Technologist role, shipping scalable platforms and services in marketing-related domains
You are experienced in SQL, Python (or other programming languages), Databricks/Tableau Dashboards and familiar with ETL tools and integration with Marketing systems.
You have hands-on experience in using AWS services like S3, Lambda, etc.
You have experience applying systems thinking to drive the shift to an AI-native operating model and fundamentally change workflows.
You are skilled in implementing AI-driven tooling and integrations.

You champion fast experimentation cycles with AI capabilities to validate and translate new technical direction.

You have operational excellence, clear communication and take ownership of your work.

description:
About the job

About The Team

We are looking for an experienced Marketing Technologist or Marketing TPM in the Marketing Operations space to help build highly coordinated and efficient infrastructure that enables Zillow's marketing organization. As part of this role, you will integrate with and operate on various marketing systems and will be a key point person for data, infrastructure, activation and analytics for marketing initiatives and campaigns.

About The Role

This role will serve as a technical liaison between marketing, analytics, engineering and marketing vendor teams to bring all partners together toward a common goal. The ideal candidate shines in a fast-paced and ambiguous environment, and has a balance of program management and hands on technical skills. If you like solving complex problems and are passionate about enabling marketing teams and delivering the vision of Zillow 2.0, we want to hear from you!


Play a key role in configuration, integration and operations of marketing systems including Marketing Analytics Platform to help with automating data ingestion pipelines, building taxonomy tools, datasets for end to end Marketing Campaign performance and reporting. 
This role is a combination of hands-on-keyboards(Manage marketing systems integrations, data ingestion, and built ETLs to prepare analytics datasets) AND program management (work with various teams to align on roadmaps for collecting, testing and preparing both third party and own data). 
Integral team member driving the marketing technology roadmap by participating in onboarding of new platforms from implementation, integration, execution, data and security compliance review and training user teams. 
Drive the shift to an AI-native operating model by applying systems thinking to fundamentally change workflows, leveraging AI as a 'creator' and 'true coworker'. 
Lead the investigation and implementation of AI-driven tooling and integrations (e.g., Meta Ads AI Connectors, LLM-powered agents, Databricks embedded prompts) to automate campaign setup, content generation, and operational execution for marketing initiatives. 
Enable self-service data and conversational analytics by deploying AI/LLM agents to allow non-technical teams to query diverse data sources and surface campaign performance insights. 
Build dashboards/reports needed by marketing teams using AI and Genie spaces. 
Coordinating with other dev dependencies to align cross-tech team sprint schedules & release plans. 
Documents and maintains standard/efficient processes, automating as much as possible. 
Enable cross-team testing scenarios. 


This role has been categorized as a teleworker position. Teleworkers do not have a permanent corporate office workplace and instead work from a physical location of their choice, which must be identified to the Company. Employees may live anywhere in Mexico, with availability to travel to Mexico City, as we recommend attendance at occasional office events.

In addition to a competitive base salary and benefits, this position is also eligible for equity awards based on factors such as experience, performance and location.

Who you are


You have 3+ years of experience in Engineering, Analytics, Tech. Operations, Marketing Technologist role, shipping scalable platforms and services in marketing-related domains
You are experienced in SQL, Python (or other programming languages), Databricks/Tableau Dashboards and familiar with ETL tools and integration with Marketing systems. 
You have hands-on experience in using AWS services like S3, Lambda, etc. 
You have experience applying systems thinking to drive the shift to an AI-native operating model and fundamentally change workflows. 
You are skilled in implementing AI-driven tooling and integrations. 
You have experience enabling self-service and conversational analytics by deploying AI/LLM agents. 
You champion fast experimentation cycles with AI capabilities to validate and translate new technical direction. 
You gravitate toward the detail but can keep the big picture in focus. 
You love data and all that it can power. 
You take a highly analytical approach, using data to drive step-change results. 
You have experience in a TPM tool like Wrike or JIRA. 
You exhibit a collaborative working style with a solid focus on execution
You have the modesty to question assumptions, seek broad input, and validate iteratively. 
You have operational excellence, clear communication and take ownership of your work. 
Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Operations Management, or similar field preferred or equivalent experience


Get to know us

At Zillow, we’re reimagining how people move—through the real estate market and through their careers. As the most-visited real estate platform in the U.S., we help customers navigate buying, selling, financing and renting with greater ease and confidence. Whether you're working in tech, sales, operations, or design, you’ll be part of a company that's reshaping an industry and helping more people make home a reality.

Zillow is honored to be recognized among the best workplaces in the country. Zillow was named one of FORTUNE 100 Best Companies to Work For® in 2025, and included on the PEOPLE Companies That Care® 2025 list, reflecting our commitment to creating an innovative, inclusive, and engaging culture where employees are empowered to grow.

No matter where you sit in the organization, your work will help drive innovation, support our customers, and move the industry—and your career—forward, together.

Zillow Group is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive, innovative environment with the best employees. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please contact your recruiter directly.

Qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with applicable state and local law.

Los Angeles County applicants: Job duties for this position include: work safely and cooperatively with other employees, supervisors, and staff; adhere to standards of excellence despite stressful conditions; communicate effectively and respectfully with employees, supervisors, and staff to ensure exceptional customer service; and follow all federal, state, and local laws and Company policies. Criminal history may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship with some of the material job duties of this position. These include the duties and responsibilities listed above, as well as the abilities to adhere to company policies, exercise sound judgment, effectively manage stress and work safely and respectfully with others, exhibit trustworthiness and professionalism, and safeguard business operations and the Company’s reputation. Pursuant to the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.
