description:
About the job

About The Company

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

For more information, please visit: www.didiglobal.com/news

About The Team/role

In this role, you will lead marketing growth and product strategy, connecting business ambition with brand vision through data-driven and strategic thinking. You will define clear goals and plans that drive market share growth and user value.

You will develop and scale innovative marketing initiatives, translating insights into strong brand strategies, campaigns, and messaging frameworks. With a business-driven mindset, you will use internal and external data to identify growth opportunities across product, value proposition, and market expansion.

You will turn high-level strategy into concrete execution—campaign blueprints, briefs, media inputs, and RTBs—while tracking performance across brand and business metrics to optimize impact. You will also create toolkits and playbooks to scale learnings, ensure brand consistency, and stay ahead of market and consumer trends.

In this role, you'll be...


Leading marketing growth and product strategy connecting the business ambition with the brand vision based on analytical and strategic thinking, including development of goals, approach, strategic definition and plan. 
Bring innovative marketing ideas to the table, and best in class strategic initiatives, obtaining buy-in and efficiently implementing them at scale through marketing programs. 
Business driven mindset defining strategic plans and actions to increase market share. 
Use internal and external data to find relevant insights that transform into effective Brand insights, campaigns and content. 
Drive research recommendations, and discussions to find sources of growth around the product, user value proposition and market expansion. 
Translate high-level strategy and positioning into concrete deliverables (campaign blueprints, messaging frameworks, value propositions, etc.)
Develop marketing campaigns; providing input into media plans, key messaging RTBs and strategic briefs.
Develop campaign reporting crossing business results with brand results to find sources of growth for user value creation based on learnings and optimizations. 
Develop enablement materials (Toolkits, playbooks) to scale new developments/learnings and help drive brand consistency and market penetration.
Remain fully informed on market trends and marketing brand campaigns.



We're eager to be in touch because you have...


6+ years of relevant experience developing marketing strategy and plan at a regional level. 
Strong stakeholder management and leadership influencing teams. 
Knowledge in product marketing, inapp campaigns and go to marketing strategies. 
Fast learner; ability to manage competing priorities and operate effectively in a matrixed organization / fast-paced environment
Understands the “why” and applies critical thinking and strategic reasoning to decision making. 
Experience in Brand and business KPIs analysis 
Experience with in-app and 360 campaigns
Be able to work under constant deadline pressure and manage multiple projects.
You are fluent in English. 



You'll love working at DiDi because...

We create user value

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

We are data-driven

We are strong believers in making informed decisions, that’s why we are data-driven. We can better navigate the business landscape strategically by analyzing valuable metrics.

Win-win Collaboration

Success is a team sport. When we work to help our partners and colleagues win, we win, too. While keeping everyone's best interest at heart, we communicate with candor and execute with excellence in all we do.

We believe in integrity

Integrity is at the very core of our business. We are people who always want to do the right thing. Our intentions are sincere, we speak our minds and listen to each other.

Growth

We always strive to do better. That means venturing beyond our comfort zones, learning from our mistakes, and helping each other grow.

Diversity and Inclusion

Diversity is one of our biggest strengths. Our differences are what make us distinct. We respect each other and believe in equal opportunities for all.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams

At DiDi, we believe that our differences are our biggest source of strength. That’s why we are committed to promoting equal opportunities to all candidates and employees as an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Employment and advancement decisions at DiDi are always made based on the needs of the position and the qualifications of the candidate. We do not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on their gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, pregnancy/maternity, disability, race, religion and beliefs, or any other status protected by applicable laws wherever we operate.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams, and a workplace that is free from discrimination and harassment, because that’s how we create better products and services, make better decisions and better serve the communities we’re a part of.

title: Product & Marketing Engineer
skills: NPI Sample Management: Source, track, and manage New Product Introduction (NPI) samples, ensuring timely availability and proper documentation in close collaboration with Product Managers and Engineering.

2–4 years of experience in Product Marketing, Product Management, Engineering or related functions (automotive aftermarket or manufacturing industry experience preferred).

description:
About the job

Company Description

Bosch fue fundada en Stuttgart en 1886 por Robert Bosch (1861-1942), y por más de 130 años se ha distinguido por una cultura corporativa única, basada en valores sólidos que nos impulsan a mejorar cada día. Nuestros productos, presentes en una amplia variedad de terrenos, contribuyen a mejorar la calidad de vida de millones de personas.

Job Description

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented professional to join our Product Marketing team. In this role, you will play a key part in the New Product Introduction (NPI) process, ensuring efficient execution, strong data management, and cross-functional alignment.

The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment, values precision, and data integrity, and enjoys collaborating across teams to bring new products to market successfully.

Key Responsibilities


 NPI Sample Management: Source, track, and manage New Product Introduction (NPI) samples, ensuring timely availability and proper documentation in close collaboration with Product Managers and Engineering.
 OE Data Mapping: Accurately map and validate OE numbers, safeguarding data integrity while accelerating catalog updates and supporting early identification of potential NPIs.
 Release Coordination: Initiate and oversee VitAA releases for Brake NPIs, ensuring smooth execution, clear communication, and alignment with Product Managers and Product Owners.
 Cross-Functional Collaboration: Act as a key liaison between Product Management, Engineering, and the NPI team to ensure project milestones and timelines are achieved.
 Data Quality Assurance: Maintain and monitor product data accuracy to support catalog readiness and market launches.


Qualifications

Qualifications & Experience

Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Marketing, Business Administration, or related field.


 2–4 years of experience in Product Marketing, Product Management, Engineering or related functions (automotive aftermarket or manufacturing industry experience preferred).
 Strong analytical skills with proven ability to manage large datasets and ensure data accuracy.
 Experience with product lifecycle systems, ERP, or catalog management tools.
 Excellent communication and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously.


Desired Skills & Competencies


 Detail-oriented mindset with a commitment to accuracy and process efficiency.
 Ability to thrive in fast-paced, cross-functional environments.
 Strong problem-solving and critical-thinking skills.
 Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel required; Power BI or data visualization tools a plus).
 Team player with strong interpersonal skills and a collaborative approach.


Additional Information

Bosch amplía constantemente su presencia internacional, ya que para nosotros la diversidad cultural representa una de nuestras mayores fuerzas. Impulsamos continuamente el crecimiento de nuestros más de 13 mil asociados, quienes desarrollan todo su potencial en una de las empresas con más alta calidad en materia de tecnología. Valoramos el balance entre vida personal y laboral como una de las principales herramientas para mejorar la creatividad y productividad de nuestros asociados.

title: Marketing Communications Designer
skills: Develop in-market retail product launch campaign and design all marketing materials

4-6 years of experience in marketing communications (B2B, corporate, Sales support, and/or MarCom)
Excellent Spanish and English written skills and strong command of verbal communication.
Familiarity with social media tools and platforms.
Familiarity with marketing and design platforms.
Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, with proven ability to create visually engaging marketing materials and tools.
Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines.
Collaborative team player comfortable working across departments.
Passion for global brand storytelling and helping partners express and extend the brand authentically and creatively.
Ability to deal with changing environments, tight timelines and multiple projects.
Ability to execute and excel in high-paced organization.
Team player mindset with a high level of energy and enthusiasm.
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Graphic Design, Digital Design, related field.
Strong communication, organizational, and design skills.
Exceptional attention to detail and ability to synthesize direction into compelling stories and stories.
Creative mindset with an understanding of marketing storytelling across digital and partner channels.
Fluency in English and Spanish (written and verbal). Additional languages a plus.
Portfolio demonstrating strong digital design (presentations, social, web, B2B/corporate) and video/motion work.
Advanced proficiency in Adobe Creative Cloud: Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign
Strong proficiency in Microsoft PowerPoint; able to create elevated, on-brand decks for Sales and leadership.
Solid understanding of digital production standards (RGB vs. CMYK, resolution, file formats, platform specs).
Excellent visual storytelling, layout, and typography skills.
Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple, fast-turn projects.
Collaborative team player with strong communication skills and a proactive mindset.
No specific certifications required.
Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite.
Working knowledge of Canva
Proficient in Mac OS.
Adobe Creative Cloud: Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Premiere Pro, After Effects, Acrobat.
Microsoft Office Suite: PowerPoint, Word, Excel, Outlook.
Familiarity with social and digital platforms (e.g., LinkedIn, YouTube, basic CMS tools) and their asset requirements.
Familiar with AI generation tools.
While performing the duties of this job, the team member is regularly required to talk and hear.
The team member frequently is required to sit; have flexible use of hands; reach with hands and arms; and stoop, kneel, crouch, or crawl.
The team member is occasionally required to stand, walk, and taste or smell.
The team member must regularly lift and/or move up to 10 pounds and occasionally lift and/or move up to 25 - 50 pounds.
Specific vision abilities required by this job include close vision, distance vision, color vision, peripheral vision, depth perception, and the ability to adjust focus.
General office environment
Expected in office at minimum 3 days/week and moving towards 5 days/week.
description:
About the job

Please note: All resumes must be submitted in English, as the hiring process will be conducted in English.




SUMMARY

We are seeking a Marketing Communications Designer to create compelling, visual storytelling that supports Kids2’s in-market launches, marketing communications and B2B efforts. This role will focus on designing digital and video assets that help our global teams tell a cohesive Kids2 enterprise story - elevating our brands, capabilities, and partnerships with retailers and other key stakeholders. In-market retail product launch experience in Mexico is a must!

The ideal candidate combines strong digital design skills and storytelling. They can translate complex ideas into clear, engaging visuals and are comfortable working across presentations, social/digital content, and short-form video.

This highly cross-functional role partners closely with Category, Social, Marketing, Communications, Sales, E-commerce, and Creative teams to ensure storytelling reflects a shared direction.

The ideal candidate is creative, collaborative, and detail-oriented, with a passion for global brand storytelling. They bring ideas to life through thoughtful design and development, and possess excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.




PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES AND ESSENTIAL FUNCTIONS:

Develop in-market retail product launch campaign and design all marketing materials
Support at-large marketing campaigns including B2B and corporate focused visuals (newsletters, PPT, campaign graphics, etc.) and social media
Edit and produce short-form video content that supports:
Sales storytelling (sell-in videos)
Social
Corporate and brand narrative (company story, capabilities, milestones)
Collaborate closely with Category, Social, Marketing, Communications, Sales, E-commerce, and Creative teams to understand objectives and translate them into effective visual communications that tell Kids2 enterprise strategy in compelling, insight-led narratives that connect our purpose, brands and products into a cohesive story.
Adapt existing creative and footage into new formats, cuts, and specs for different channels, audiences, and retailers.
Maintain organized libraries of visual assets, templates, and footage for reuse and consistency.
Manage multiple projects and deadlines in a fast-paced environment, proactively communicating status and timing.

Passion for global brand storytelling and helping partners express and extend the brand authentically and creatively.

Team player mindset with a high level of energy and enthusiasm.

Strong communication, organizational, and design skills.
Exceptional attention to detail and ability to synthesize direction into compelling stories and stories.
Creative mindset with an understanding of marketing storytelling across digital and partner channels.

Premiere Pro and After Effects

title: Practicante de Marketing
description:
About the job

Oportunidad de Prácticas Profesionales | Marketing




Se busca estudiante universitario(a) para integrarse como Practicante de Marketing y brindar apoyo al área en actividades operativas, analíticas y de seguimiento dentro de la industria farmacéutica.




Objetivo del puesto

Brindar soporte operativo, analítico y creativo al equipo de Marketing, colaborando en la implementación de estrategias de comunicación, promoción y posicionamiento de productos.




Responsabilidades

• Apoyar en la ejecución de campañas promocionales y actividades de marketing.

• Recopilar y analizar información de mercado, tendencias y competencia.

• Dar soporte en la organización y logística de eventos, lanzamientos y capacitaciones.

• Elaborar reportes y presentaciones para el área.

• Dar seguimiento a proyectos y estrategias de marketing.

• Apoyar en el control y seguimiento de presupuestos y órdenes de compra.

• Coordinar actividades con proveedores externos.




Requisitos

• Estudiante activo(a) de Mercadotecnia, Administración o carrera afín.

• Contar con 1.5 a 2 años para concluir la licenciatura.

• Manejo de Excel intermedio (indispensable).

• Inglés intermedio.

• Conocimiento de herramientas de análisis de datos (deseable).

• Capacidad analítica y orientación al detalle.

• Proactividad, actitud de servicio y sentido de urgencia.




Condiciones

• Duración inicial de 6 meses, con posibilidad de renovación.

• Esquema híbrido.

• Horario: Lunes a viernes de 8:00 a 14:00 hrs.

• Ubicación: Polanco, Ciudad de México.

title: Associate Retail Marketing Manager (Bilingual - English/Spanish)
skills: Job Title: Associate Retail Marketing Manager - Central & South America

Job Summary: Supports the Global Sales organization & Retail Marketing team to pitch and manage execution of retail activations in Central & South America. This individual will partner closely with internal stakeholders and external partners to create impactful consumer experiences where Pokémon products are sold.
FLSA Classification (US Only): Exempt
People Manager: No
Develop proposals with Central & South America TCG Sales team to secure incremental product placements and promotional opportunities at priority retail accounts.
Partner with Bellevue-based marketing teams, creative & brand services, legal, finance, and other internal departments to ensure in-market experiences adhere to TPCi global standards.
Identify new opportunities in the retail landscape for Pokémon that connect brand equity with local cultures.
Manage project execution, communicate status, and analyze performance with a focus on continuous improvement.
Three (3) to four (4) years of relevant professional experience or a demonstrated equivalent level of expertise.
Bachelor's degree in a related field or a demonstrated equivalent level of applicable experience.
Languages: Excellent verbal and communication skills in both English and Latin American Spanish, at near-native level.
Passion to create unique programs that combine Pokémon and partner goals
Experience working with external partners and able to communicate clearly and troubleshoot challenges diplomatically
Demonstrable ability to project manage, work cross functionally, and oversee multiple projects with various stakeholders
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Proficiency in Microsoft Office.

Passion for Pokémon: Develops an understanding of the Pokémon brand, the impact it has on our people, culture, business, fans, and communities, and applying that knowledge and passion to everything you do.

Challenging the Expected: Approaches challenges with curiosity and creativity, embracing the possibility of failure as an opportunity to learn something new, develop innovative ideas, solve complex problems and identify unique opportunities.

Integrity and Respect: Demonstrates integrity and respect by leading with empathy, listening to others, seeking out different perspectives, and taking personal responsibility for decisions, actions, and results.

Dedicated to Quality: Takes ownership to maintain and promote high standards, looks for new ways to learn and improve, and embraces a growth mindset to seek and apply feedback from others in an effort to continuously improve.
Building Relationships: Develops and strengthens relationships, adopting a “team first” mentality and working collaboratively to solve problems and meet shared goals.

Delighting Customers: Listens and understands the interests and needs of our customers and stakeholders, making them feel heard and important, and embracing these learnings to continue delivering a unique Pokémon experience.
An innovative culture driven by impact, delivering meaningful outcomes.
Company events that celebrate the spirit of Pokémon.
Competitive cash-based compensation programs.
100% employer-paid healthcare premiums for you.
Generous paid family leave.
Employer-paid life insurance.
Employer-paid long and short-term income protection insurance.
US Employees: 401k Employer Matching.
UK/IRE/MX Employees: Pension Employer Contributions.
Fitness reimbursement.
Commuter benefit.
LinkedIn learning.
Comprehensive relocation package for certain roles.
Hybrid work environment.
description:
About the job

Get To Know The Pokémon Company International

The Pokémon Company International manages the Pokémon property outside of Asia and is responsible for brand management, licensing and marketing, the Pokémon Trading Card Game, the animated TV series, home entertainment, and the official Pokémon website. Pokémon was launched in Japan in 1996 and today is one of the most popular children’s entertainment properties in the world.

Learn more online at corporate.pokemon.com and pokemon.com.

 

Note: Please include an English version of your resume with your application

Get to know the role


Job Title: Associate Retail Marketing Manager - Central & South America 
Job Summary: Supports the Global Sales organization & Retail Marketing team to pitch and manage execution of retail activations in Central & South America. This individual will partner closely with internal stakeholders and external partners to create impactful consumer experiences where Pokémon products are sold. 
FLSA Classification (US Only): Exempt 
People Manager: No 


What you’ll do


Develop proposals with Central & South America TCG Sales team to secure incremental product placements and promotional opportunities at priority retail accounts. 
Partner with Bellevue-based marketing teams, creative & brand services, legal, finance, and other internal departments to ensure in-market experiences adhere to TPCi global standards. 
Identify new opportunities in the retail landscape for Pokémon that connect brand equity with local cultures. 
Manage project execution, communicate status, and analyze performance with a focus on continuous improvement. 


What you’ll bring


Three (3) to four (4) years of relevant professional experience or a demonstrated equivalent level of expertise. 
Bachelor's degree in a related field or a demonstrated equivalent level of applicable experience. 
Languages: Excellent verbal and communication skills in both English and Latin American Spanish, at near-native level.
Passion to create unique programs that combine Pokémon and partner goals 
Experience working with external partners and able to communicate clearly and troubleshoot challenges diplomatically 
Demonstrable ability to project manage, work cross functionally, and oversee multiple projects with various stakeholders 
Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 
Proficiency in Microsoft Office. 


How You’ll Be Successful


Passion for Pokémon: Develops an understanding of the Pokémon brand, the impact it has on our people, culture, business, fans, and communities, and applying that knowledge and passion to everything you do.
Challenging the Expected: Approaches challenges with curiosity and creativity, embracing the possibility of failure as an opportunity to learn something new, develop innovative ideas, solve complex problems and identify unique opportunities. 
Integrity and Respect: Demonstrates integrity and respect by leading with empathy, listening to others, seeking out different perspectives, and taking personal responsibility for decisions, actions, and results.
Dedicated to Quality: Takes ownership to maintain and promote high standards, looks for new ways to learn and improve, and embraces a growth mindset to seek and apply feedback from others in an effort to continuously improve. 
Building Relationships: Develops and strengthens relationships, adopting a “team first” mentality and working collaboratively to solve problems and meet shared goals. 
Delighting Customers: Listens and understands the interests and needs of our customers and stakeholders, making them feel heard and important, and embracing these learnings to continue delivering a unique Pokémon experience.


What To Expect


An innovative culture driven by impact, delivering meaningful outcomes.
Company events that celebrate the spirit of Pokémon.
Competitive cash-based compensation programs.
100% employer-paid healthcare premiums for you.
Generous paid family leave.
Employer-paid life insurance.
Employer-paid long and short-term income protection insurance.
US Employees: 401k Employer Matching.
UK/IRE/MX Employees: Pension Employer Contributions.
Fitness reimbursement.
Commuter benefit.
LinkedIn learning.
Comprehensive relocation package for certain roles.
Hybrid work environment.


The above statements are intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed by people assigned to this role. They are not to be construed as an exhaustive list of all responsibilities, duties, and skills required. Employees may be required to perform duties outside of their normal responsibilities from time to time, as needed. For roles in the United Kingdom, candidates will need the right to work. In some cases, and for some roles, the Company may be able to arrange a visa. For roles in Ireland, this role requires candidates to have the right to live and work in the Republic of Ireland. However, we welcome applications from all nationalities and may consider supporting an employment permit application, in appropriate and suitable cases.

The Pokémon Company International is committed to the inclusion of all qualified applicants for consideration in our job application process. If you require reasonable accommodation to complete a job application, pre-employment testing, or a job interview, or to otherwise participate in the hiring process, please contact the Talent Acquisition team at accommodationrequest_ta@pokemon.com.

title: Especialista Comercial - Mercado Ads
skills: Vibran energía emprendedora: se mueven por la curiosidad, nunca se rinden y se enfocan en superar sus propios límites.
Dan el máximo porque les gusta trabajar con compromiso y dedicación.
Viven los cambios como oportunidades y aprenden de sus errores.
La excelencia y la ejecución son claves en su forma de hacer las cosas.
Promueven el buen clima, aportan alegría y diversión.
Saben cómo construir con otras personas y disfrutan trabajando en equipo.
Administrar una cartera de clientes, cumpliendo los SLAs corporativos definidos por cada tipo de cliente, generando una relación de confianza, logrando impulsar sus negocios.

Actuar como socio estratégico de marketing digital y experto consultivo para los anunciantes, recomendando best practices, impulsando la experimentación con nuevos productos Ads y conectando los objetivos del cliente con los productos más innovadores de la plataforma.

Desarrollar e implementar estrategias comerciales y de publicidad digital para grandes marcas de Toys & Babies, alineando las necesidades del cliente y los objetivos de Mercado Ads, con un enfoque tanto on como off site.

Gestionar y optimizar campañas publicitarias a través del análisis de KPIs, generación de reportes y propuestas de mejora continua, asegurando la efectividad, adopción de soluciones y entrega exitosa de resultados para los clientes estratégicos.

Identificar nuevas oportunidades de negocio y ejecutar planes de acción comerciales y de upselling, presentando soluciones personalizadas y creativas a lo largo del funnel de usuario, colaborando con equipos cross-funcionales para potenciar el crecimiento de las marcas.Crear alianzas estratégicas con stakeholders clave, como los ejecutivos de cuenta del Marketplace.

Liderar negociaciones con marcas y agencias, desde el cierre de acuerdos anuales (JBPs) hasta la presentación y seguimiento de campañas estratégicas, asegurando relaciones de largo plazo y el desarrollo del footprint de las marcas en Mercado Libre.
Ser profesional de las carreras de Actuaría, Economía, Administración Financiera o afines.
Contar con 5 años de experiencia desarrollada en posiciones similares.
Tener experiencia en posiciones comerciales, ventas o de marketing.
Manejo de herramientas SQL, Big Query, es deseable.
Dominio de Excel y/o Google Sheets.
Ser parte de una compañía con espíritu emprendedor en la que nos encanta pensar en grande y a largo plazo.
Ser protagonista de tu desarrollo en un ambiente de oportunidades, aprendizaje, crecimiento, expansión y proyectos desafiantes.
Compartir y aprender en equipo junto a grandes profesionales y especialistas.
Un excelente clima de trabajo, con todo lo necesario para que vivas una gran experiencia. :)
description:

En Mercado Libre estamos democratizando el comercio y los servicios financieros para transformar la vida de las personas de América Latina. ¡Súmate a este propósito!

Aplicamos creatividad en estrategias de performance, con un conocimiento único de perfiles de audiencia y herramientas de analytics avanzadas.

Actuar como socio estratégico de marketing digital y experto consultivo para los anunciantes, recomendando best practices, impulsando la experimentación con nuevos productos Ads y conectando los objetivos del cliente con los productos más innovadores de la plataforma.
Desarrollar e implementar estrategias comerciales y de publicidad digital para grandes marcas de Toys & Babies, alineando las necesidades del cliente y los objetivos de Mercado Ads, con un enfoque tanto on como off site.
Gestionar y optimizar campañas publicitarias a través del análisis de KPIs, generación de reportes y propuestas de mejora continua, asegurando la efectividad, adopción de soluciones y entrega exitosa de resultados para los clientes estratégicos.
Identificar nuevas oportunidades de negocio y ejecutar planes de acción comerciales y de upselling, presentando soluciones personalizadas y creativas a lo largo del funnel de usuario, colaborando con equipos cross-funcionales para potenciar el crecimiento de las marcas.Crear alianzas estratégicas con stakeholders clave, como los ejecutivos de cuenta del Marketplace.

title: Email Marketing Account Manager
skills: You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent
Minh Vo - Founder
description:
About the job

I’m helping Email Clout find a top candidate to join their team flexible for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager.




You'll drive revenue and client success by independently managing end-to-end email marketing campaigns.




Compensation:

USD 300 - 1.5K/month




Location:

Remote: Mexico




Mission of Email Clout:

"Empower online brands with high-impact, revenue-driving email campaigns. Fast, accountable, and world-class results."




What makes you a strong candidate:

You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent




Responsibilities and more:

Email Clout is an email marketing agency that partners with online brands to create unique, engaging, and revenue-generating email campaigns and flows. We’re fully remote, small, and love to move fast. We hold ourselves accountable for delivering a world-class client experience and industry-shattering email performance. 




We are looking for the ideal candidate for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager, who will be responsible for the experience and performance of client accounts. In this role, you will manage and execute email marketing campaigns and flows from start to finish. This includes coming up with ideas, planning, writing copy, communicating with clients and internal teams, as well as implementation in Klaviyo. You will use Klaviyo and Figma while managing your tasks independently through Notion. Below are the key responsibilities for this role. 




- Create and manage multiple email content calendars. 

- Plan, write, and schedule email marketing campaigns and flows. 

- Collect, report, present, and analyze past data to make the best decisions for clients. 

- Conduct and lead client calls. 

- Handle difficult questions related to email performance. 

- Make design and copy changes in Figma. 

- Collaborate and manage designers and copywriters. 

- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in email marketing. 




Software stack you’ll be using: 

- Slack 

- Klaviyo 

- Figma 

- Shopify 

- Notion 




Requirements: 

- 1-2 years of experience in email marketing, preferably with experience using Klaviyo. 

- Proficiency in Figma or similar design software. 

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 

- Strong attention to detail and multitasking ability. 

- Familiarity with email marketing best practices and metrics. 

- Confident in communicating with clients. 

- Perfect English (spoken and written). 




Do Not Apply If: 

- You’re okay with delays or errors in client work. 

- You’re willing to work only during regular hours. 

- You can only write when assisted by ChatGPT. 

- You don’t take deadlines seriously. 

- You lack urgency in completing work. 

- You don’t have the resourcefulness to solve problems on your own first. 

- You don’t feel confident in your email marketing abilities.




Your potential leader(s):

Minh Vo - Founder



Desired Skills and Experience

Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting, Client communication, Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma

title: RSNA Expert - Marketing Specialist
description:
About the job

Position Summary:

We are seeking an experienced Overseas Exhibition Project Manager to oversee the comprehensive management of the entire process for international exhibitions, including the Radiological Society of North America (RSNA) annual meeting. This role will lead exhibition planning, execution, vendor coordination, and client relationship management to ensure optimal brand presentation and participation outcomes at international events. Additionally, this position will serve as a key liaison for the company's digital accounts, collaborating closely with the marketing team to effectively convert offline exhibition traffic into online digital assets.




Position Responsibilities:

1. Exhibition Project Management (RSNA & Overseas Exhibitions)

· Manage the full lifecycle of planning and execution for the RSNA annual meeting and other overseas exhibitions, including booth reservation, exhibit material shipping, construction plan coordination, and on-site services.

· Maintain efficient communication with venues, external suppliers (construction, logistics, service providers) to ensure the smooth execution of all exhibition phases.

· Develop and manage project timelines and quality standards, ensuring critical milestones are met on schedule.

· Oversee on-site operations during exhibitions, including construction supervision, activity execution, and emergency handling.

· Possess thorough knowledge of RSNA rules and regulations to ensure exhibition behavior complies with organizer requirements and mitigates compliance risks.

2. Supplier and Budget Management

· Participate in the tendering, evaluation, and selection process for service suppliers (construction, logistics, PR, etc.), managing the Request for Proposals (RFP) process.

· Prepare and monitor exhibition project budgets, including booth fees, construction costs, shipping, travel expenses, etc., ensuring expenditures stay within budget and identifying cost-saving opportunities.

· Responsible for reviewing, archiving, and ensuring compliance for all exhibition-related contracts.

3. Client Relations and Sales Support

· Maintain efficient communication with exhibitors, providing professional services and on-site support.

· Nurture existing client relationships, identify potential client needs, and assist the sales team with registration and administrative processes.

· Collaborate with the digital marketing team to ensure sales leads generated during exhibitions are effectively entered into the CRM system (e.g., Salesforce) for data integration.

4. Cross-Cultural Communication & International Coordination

· Navigate cross-regional and cross-cultural work environments, building strong collaborative relationships with overseas organizers, service providers, and partners.

· Adapt to overseas travel requirements, leading teams to participate in RSNA and other international exhibitions, providing on-site support and problem-solving.

· Coordinate with internal departments (Marketing, Sales, Product, etc.) to ensure exhibition objectives align with the company's overall strategy.

5. Documentation and Reporting

· Organize, archive, and manage exhibition-related documents, including participation contracts, service agreements, and exhibition materials.

· Regularly prepare comprehensive post-exhibition summary reports, including effectiveness evaluation, ROI analysis, and recommendations for improvement

· Monitor industry trends and exhibition developments, providing data-driven insights and optimization suggestions for the company's exhibition strategy.




Required Skills & Education:

1. Education Background

· Bachelor's degree or above, preferably in International Business, Exhibition Management, Marketing, or a related field.

2. Work Experience

· Minimum 3 years of project management experience specifically with overseas exhibitions, having successfully led the preparation and execution of multiple international events.

· Experience with RSNA or other major medical/professional international exhibitions is highly preferred.

· Experience in domestic and international exhibition organization is preferred.

3. Professional Skills

· Proficient in the full cycle of exhibition project management, including planning, execution, and evaluation.

· Familiar with international trade practices and characteristics of overseas markets, possessing strong negotiation skills.

· Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite and project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Asana).

· Familiarity with CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce) is a plus.

· Experience in financial modeling and budget management is an advantage.

4. Language Ability

· Fluent in English with excellent listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills, capable of using English as a working language for business communication with international partners.

· Overseas work or study background is highly preferred.

5. Core Competencies

· Excellent communication, coordination, and execution skills, capable of building and maintaining strong collaborative relationships across departments and international teams.

· Strong project and time management skills, able to handle multiple tasks and emergencies simultaneously.

· High sense of responsibility and strong ability to work under pressure, adaptable to overseas travel and the high-intensity pace of exhibition work.

· Strong learning agility and market insight, capable of quickly grasping industry dynamics.

· Customer-oriented mindset with attention to detail and a pursuit of excellence in the industry’s exhibition experience.




Carestream is an Equal Opportunity Employer

Carestream is an equal opportunity organization. We recruit, employ, train, compensate, and promote withoutregard to race, religion, creed, color, national origin, age, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status,disability, veteran status, or any other basis protected by applicable federal, state or local law.

Applying for a job with Carestream

All applicants must complete the on-line application process.

description:

💸 Competitive Salary in USD | 🌍 100% Remote | 🎯 Paid Search & Social Role | 🏆 Award-Winning Agency Culture

🔑 Your Role:




You will manage and optimize paid search and social campaigns for automotive dealership clients — trained and mentored by top specialists while taking real ownership of results. Your day-to-day will involve:




Managing and optimizing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns — delivering higher ROI and lower cost per conversion for automotive dealership clients.
Conducting daily account audits, budget pacing, and campaign adjustments to keep performance on track and spend optimized.
Generating performance reports from Google Ads and Meta — and conducting client calls to present strategies and results clearly and confidently.
Managing OEM reimbursement processes — reviewing requirements, gathering materials, and submitting claims accurately and on time.
Using Google Analytics, Data Studio, Tag Manager, Merchant Center, and Meta Ads Manager to analyze data and drive campaign improvements.
Collaborating with SEOs, writers, and designers on new experiments and client work — contributing to a team that tests, learns, and pushes boundaries daily.

Prior agency experience — you understand client management, reporting, and the pace of agency work.
Detail-oriented, research-driven, and a strong communicator in written and spoken English.
Bonus: automotive vertical experience, OEM reimbursement knowledge, or campaigns you can show us with real results.
To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.




💼 What We Offer:

🌴 10 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. federal holidays.
💻 100% remote — open to candidates based in LATAM or Europe.

Ready to Apply?

title: SEM Senior Associate
skills: Build and manage paid search campaigns, creating new campaigns and optimizing existing ones to meet client performance goals.
Analyze and optimize campaign performance on a daily, weekly, and monthly basis, using data-driven insights to identify and act on opportunities for improvement.
Execute and oversee search marketing campaigns, including ad group setup, keyword research and expansion, budget pacing, forecasting, and performance reporting.
Test and refine campaign strategies, driving continuous improvement through creative testing and performance analysis.
Contribute to budget management, monitoring spend across accounts and making recommendations to maximize results.
Create and maintain detailed performance reports, pulling data from search platforms and additional sources to provide actionable insights.
Stay informed on SEM industry trends, assessing their impact on clients and making proactive recommendations.
Leverage PMG’s proprietary technology platform, Alli, to analyze data, streamline processes, and drive impactful results for clients.
3+ years of experience in paid search, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience.
Advanced knowledge of paid search platforms like Google Ads and Microsoft Ads, enabling you to create and optimize campaigns that deliver measurable results.
Proficiency in campaign management, including keyword research, campaign, budget pacing, and forecasting to meet performance goals.
Expertise in analyzing performance metrics and delivering actionable insights to enhance campaign outcomes.
Experience with A/B testing methodologies and creative testing to refine strategies and drive continuous improvement.
Proficiency in tools like Microsoft Excel, Google Analytics, and SQL to manage data, uncover valuable insights, and create clear, actionable performance reports.
Strong organizational and collaborative skills, enabling you to align efforts across internal teams and clients effectively.

A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a continual learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a customer-focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value.
A dedication to people-focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by leading by example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel.

description:
About the job

We are PMG

Named Ad Age Best Places to Work for 11 years in a row and Fast Company Best Workplaces for Innovators since 2022, PMG is a global independent marketing services and technology company that seeks to inspire people and brands that anything is possible. Driven by shared success, PMG leverages business strategy and transformation, creative, media, and insights—as well as its proprietary operating system, Alli—to deliver cutting-edge digital solutions and innovative media strategies.

Our team comprises over 900 employees globally, and our work for ambitious brands like Apple, Nike, Sephora, Experian, Therabody, Best Western Hotels & Resorts, Creed Fragrances, BNY, Intuit, CKE Restaurants, Travelex, and Whole Foods spans 85+ countries.

Professional proficiency in written and spoken English is required, including for resume submission and interviews.

Who You Will Be Working With

At PMG, our Paid Search Marketing (SEM) team is a group of creative problem solvers and strategic thinkers who thrive on helping clients achieve meaningful results. We collaborate with cross-functional teams across media strategy, analytics, and creative to develop innovative paid search campaigns that make a tangible impact.

Our team approaches search marketing with curiosity and a fresh perspective, constantly exploring new solutions and opportunities to deliver value for our clients. We pride ourselves on creating an environment where everyone can grow professionally and personally, supported by a culture that values collaboration, innovation, and individuality.

As an SEM Senior Associate, you’ll play a critical role in shaping campaign performance, managing client goals, and contributing to broader strategic initiatives. If you’re passionate about digital marketing and enjoy solving challenges in a fast-paced environment, we’d love to welcome you to our team.

What You Will Do


Build and manage paid search campaigns, creating new campaigns and optimizing existing ones to meet client performance goals. 
Analyze and optimize campaign performance on a daily, weekly, and monthly basis, using data-driven insights to identify and act on opportunities for improvement. 
Execute and oversee search marketing campaigns, including ad group setup, keyword research and expansion, budget pacing, forecasting, and performance reporting. 
Test and refine campaign strategies, driving continuous improvement through creative testing and performance analysis. 
Contribute to budget management, monitoring spend across accounts and making recommendations to maximize results. 
Create and maintain detailed performance reports, pulling data from search platforms and additional sources to provide actionable insights. 
Stay informed on SEM industry trends, assessing their impact on clients and making proactive recommendations. 
Leverage PMG’s proprietary technology platform, Alli, to analyze data, streamline processes, and drive impactful results for clients. 


What You Will Bring


3+ years of experience in paid search, with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience. 
Advanced knowledge of paid search platforms like Google Ads and Microsoft Ads, enabling you to create and optimize campaigns that deliver measurable results. 
Proficiency in campaign management, including keyword research, campaign, budget pacing, and forecasting to meet performance goals. 
Expertise in analyzing performance metrics and delivering actionable insights to enhance campaign outcomes. 
Experience with A/B testing methodologies and creative testing to refine strategies and drive continuous improvement. 
Proficiency in tools like Microsoft Excel, Google Analytics, and SQL to manage data, uncover valuable insights, and create clear, actionable performance reports. 
Strong organizational and collaborative skills, enabling you to align efforts across internal teams and clients effectively. 
A commitment to curiosity and adaptability as a continual learner, staying at the forefront of media innovation while prioritizing client success with a customer-focused mindset that seeks opportunities to deliver meaningful value. 
A dedication to people-focused leadership, fostering collaboration, innovation, and professional growth by leading by example and nurturing strong relationships that empower others to excel. 


What We Offer


Professional Development: Take advantage of our learning and development programs, mentorship opportunities, and career advancement support. 
Generous Time Off: Enjoy generous paid time off and holiday allowances to recharge and spend time with loved ones. 
Parental Leave: We provide paid parental leave to support your family during important life events. 
Retirement & Pension Plans: Plan for your future with competitive retirement or pension programs, including contribution matching. 
Fertility and Family Support: Access fertility benefits for all team members and their spouses. 
Healthcare: Coverage and support for everyday medical expenses and routine care, tailored by geography. 
Pet Insurance: Protect your pet's health and your finances. 
Lifestyle Spending Accounts: Enjoy 100% company-funded accounts to promote healthy habits and well-being. 
Commuter Benefits: Access support for travel and commuting needs, where available. 
Annual Bonus: All employees are eligible for an annual bonus. 
Volunteering Opportunities: Receive 8 give-back hours to volunteer in your local communities. 
AI Enterprise License: Access AI Enterprise accounts and participate in weekly AI training sessions to empower and ensure AI safety. 


Benefits vary by country, location, and geography to reflect local laws, norms, and expectations.

What Sets Us Apart

Being part of PMG means joining a company culture that’s unmatched in digital. We're dedicated to working hard to serve our employees and clients, delivering value, results, and innovation—which often requires true grit and agility. We believe in taking care of ourselves and each other to continuously improve in every way.

In alignment with our core values to be inclusive and always change for the better, PMG is committed to creating a more diverse and inclusive culture, and we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We believe that we only change for the better by bringing diverse perspectives to our company. PMG recruits, employs, trains, compensates, and promotes regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

Advanced Agent Marketing Client Success Support Specialist

🆔 Job ID: TIMDEE2

🏢 Industry: Financial and Advisory Services

🌎 Location: LATAM

🕒 Job Status: Full Time

⏰ Work Schedule: The Client Success Support Specialist must be available during Eastern Standard Time business hours, especially during the hours when clients are actively taking apps, attending appointments, and submitting support requests. (9:00am to 5:00pm EST)

💰 Salary: This role pays approximately $10/hour, depending on experience and fit.

🚀 Target Start Date: asap




ROLE OVERVIEW




We are looking for a Client Success Support Specialist to support our Customer Success Managers with client communication, technical questions, CRM updates, app/order tracking, refund and credit-back requests, and basic conflict resolution.

This role is ideal for someone who is tech-savvy, highly organized, strong in written English, and comfortable helping clients work through process or technology-related questions. The right person will be able to communicate clearly, keep accurate records, follow up consistently, and make good decisions without needing step-by-step direction for every situation.




Key Responsibilities




The Client Success Support Specialist will assist the Customer Success team by answering client tech questions, helping clients understand apps and internal processes, and making sure client information is accurately updated in the CRM. This person will help monitor client availability, check integrations, track app/order status, and make sure clients understand how many apps they have remaining in their order.

This role will also help quality-check disposition calls, confirm that clients are following the correct appointment process, and make sure clients complete required Google Sheets or tracking forms after calls. The specialist will communicate with internal team members about apps that have been requested for credit-back, refund review, or additional follow-up.

In addition, this person will support offboarding, document client concerns, and help de-escalate frustrated clients in a professional manner. Common client situations may include refund requests, app credit-back requests, clients saying they were not looking for an annuity, did not want a specific state, had a poor call experience, did not want to join Zoom, or are already working with another advisor.




Core Responsibilities




Client Support

Answer client questions, provide written support, and help resolve basic client issues.

Technical Assistance

Help clients with app-related questions, tool access, integrations, and process confusion.

CRM Updates

Update client records, track availability, document issues, and maintain clean client data.

App & Order Tracking

Make sure clients receive apps on time and understand how many apps remain in their order.

Credit-Back & Refund Support

Track requests, communicate status internally, and gather context needed for review.

Process Follow-Up

Ensure clients follow the appointment process and complete required Google Sheets after calls.

Conflict Resolution

Help diffuse client frustration and escalate issues appropriately when needed.

Offboarding Support

Assist with client offboarding, documentation, and final communication steps.

Required Skills and Experience

The ideal candidate must be comfortable working across multiple systems and communicating quickly with both clients and internal team members. Experience with GoHighLevel/GHL and Slack is required. Strong written English is also important because this role involves client communication, internal updates, and accurate documentation.

We are not looking for someone who is simply “point and shoot.” This person needs to understand the situation, use good judgment, and decide when to resolve an issue directly versus when to escalate it to a Customer Success Manager or backend closer.

description:
About the job

Please note: All resumes must be submitted in English, as the hiring process will be conducted in English.




SUMMARY

We are seeking a Marketing Communications Designer to create compelling, visual storytelling that supports Kids2’s in-market launches, marketing communications and B2B efforts. This role will focus on designing digital and video assets that help our global teams tell a cohesive Kids2 enterprise story - elevating our brands, capabilities, and partnerships with retailers and other key stakeholders. In-market retail product launch experience in Mexico is a must!

The ideal candidate combines strong digital design skills and storytelling. They can translate complex ideas into clear, engaging visuals and are comfortable working across presentations, social/digital content, and short-form video.

This highly cross-functional role partners closely with Category, Social, Marketing, Communications, Sales, E-commerce, and Creative teams to ensure storytelling reflects a shared direction.

The ideal candidate is creative, collaborative, and detail-oriented, with a passion for global brand storytelling. They bring ideas to life through thoughtful design and development, and possess excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.

Social

title: Marketing Specialist
skills: Digital Marketing Strategy: Develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies aimed at first responder agencies and healthcare professionals.
Content Creation: Craft compelling content including blog posts, newsletters, and social media updates that resonate with our target audience.
SEO Management: Optimize website content for search engines to enhance visibility for relevant keywords related to mental health services for first responders.
Social Media Engagement: Manage social media platforms, creating engaging posts that drive awareness and interaction among followers.
Analytics and Reporting: Analyze marketing performance metrics to assess the effectiveness of campaigns and suggest improvements.
Audience Segmentation: Identify and segment target audiences to tailor messaging specifically for different groups, including agencies and individual first responders.
Networking and Outreach: Develop relationships with potential referral sources, including healthcare providers and first responder agencies, to expand our reach.
Collaboration: Work closely with our team to align marketing efforts with overall practice goals and client needs.
Experience: Minimum 2+ years of experience marketing for American-based companies (Healthcare or Service Industry preferred).
Technical Savvy: Current with modern marketing technologies and social media algorithms; ability to use AI tools to optimize workflow (but not rely on them for core creativity).
Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills. While primarily a creative role, you must be comfortable making occasional outbound "warm" contacts to build referral relationships.
Mindset: A "shark" mentality—proactive, aggressive in pursuing visibility, and capable of working without constant micromanagement.
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field is highly preferred.
Monitoring Tools: Open to using monitoring tools like Hubstaff.

ROLE OVERVIEW




About the Client:

The Client is a growing psychological therapy and testing practice. We specialize in providing high-quality therapy and diagnostic testing (e.g., for first responders and police candidates). We are currently at a pivotal growth phase and are looking for a proactive, tech-savvy marketing professional to help us overcome our current financial bottleneck and scale our team of clinicians.




About the Role:

Our Client is seeking a high-energy Marketing Specialist (Virtual Assistant). This is not a passive task-taking role; they need a strategic thinker who understands the American healthcare landscape and can proactively drive lead generation. You will be responsible for translating the clinical expertise of the Client into a digital presence that attracts the "right fit" clients—specifically those seeking therapy and testing rather than medication management.




Key Responsibilities

Digital Marketing Strategy: Develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies aimed at first responder agencies and healthcare professionals.
Content Creation: Craft compelling content including blog posts, newsletters, and social media updates that resonate with our target audience.
SEO Management: Optimize website content for search engines to enhance visibility for relevant keywords related to mental health services for first responders.
Social Media Engagement: Manage social media platforms, creating engaging posts that drive awareness and interaction among followers.
Analytics and Reporting: Analyze marketing performance metrics to assess the effectiveness of campaigns and suggest improvements.
Audience Segmentation: Identify and segment target audiences to tailor messaging specifically for different groups, including agencies and individual first responders.
Networking and Outreach: Develop relationships with potential referral sources, including healthcare providers and first responder agencies, to expand our reach.
Collaboration: Work closely with our team to align marketing efforts with overall practice goals and client needs.




Qualifications & Skills

Experience: Minimum 2+ years of experience marketing for American-based companies (Healthcare or Service Industry preferred).
Technical Savvy: Current with modern marketing technologies and social media algorithms; ability to use AI tools to optimize workflow (but not rely on them for core creativity).
Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills. While primarily a creative role, you must be comfortable making occasional outbound "warm" contacts to build referral relationships.
Mindset: A "shark" mentality—proactive, aggressive in pursuing visibility, and capable of working without constant micromanagement.
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field is highly preferred.
Monitoring Tools: Open to using monitoring tools like Hubstaff.

About the job

TalentPop

At TalentPop, we’re looking for someone who understands how SEO connects to real business results, not just rankings.

This role is ideal for someone who is both detail-oriented and curious — someone who enjoys working with data, improving website performance, and contributing to strategies that drive organic growth.

If you already have hands-on SEO experience and want to build on it in a fast-paced, remote environment, this is a strong next step.

What You’ll Own


Conducting keyword research, SEO audits, and on-page optimization
Supporting content improvements to increase visibility and search performance
Monitoring website performance using tools like Google Analytics and SEO platforms
Assisting with backlink outreach and tracking link-building efforts
Helping manage site structure, product pages, and Shopify SEO updates
Analyzing performance data and contributing to clear, actionable reports
Staying updated on SEO trends and identifying opportunities for improvement


What Sets You Apart


At least 1 year of hands-on SEO experience, preferably within eCommerce
Familiarity with tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Analytics, and Excel
Understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO fundamentals
Strong attention to detail and ability to work with data accurately
Clear written communication and ability to collaborate with remote teams
Comfortable working independently and managing priorities in a fast-paced setup
Bonus: experience with Shopify, Klaviyo, Google Merchant Center, or Canva


Technical Requirements


Reliable internet connection with at least 25 Mbps upload and download speed
Personally owned PC or laptop with at least an i5 processor or equivalent


What You’ll Get


Permanent remote work setup
Health and dental coverage or a health stipend
Performance-based bonuses and salary growth opportunities
Paid time off
A collaborative team environment with ongoing learning and support


If you already have SEO experience and want to take on more ownership while continuing to develop your skills, we’d love to hear from you.

Apply now and grow your SEO career with us.

title: Practicante de Marketing
description:
About the job

Oportunidad de Prácticas Profesionales | Marketing




Se busca estudiante universitario(a) para integrarse como Practicante de Marketing y brindar apoyo al área en actividades operativas, analíticas y de seguimiento dentro de la industria farmacéutica.




Objetivo del puesto

Brindar soporte operativo, analítico y creativo al equipo de Marketing, colaborando en la implementación de estrategias de comunicación, promoción y posicionamiento de productos.




Responsabilidades

• Apoyar en la ejecución de campañas promocionales y actividades de marketing.

• Recopilar y analizar información de mercado, tendencias y competencia.

• Dar soporte en la organización y logística de eventos, lanzamientos y capacitaciones.

• Elaborar reportes y presentaciones para el área.

• Dar seguimiento a proyectos y estrategias de marketing.

• Apoyar en el control y seguimiento de presupuestos y órdenes de compra.

• Coordinar actividades con proveedores externos.




Requisitos

• Estudiante activo(a) de Mercadotecnia, Administración o carrera afín.

• Contar con 1.5 a 2 años para concluir la licenciatura.

• Manejo de Excel intermedio (indispensable).

• Inglés intermedio.

• Conocimiento de herramientas de análisis de datos (deseable).

• Capacidad analítica y orientación al detalle.

• Proactividad, actitud de servicio y sentido de urgencia.




Condiciones

• Duración inicial de 6 meses, con posibilidad de renovación.

• Esquema híbrido.

• Horario: Lunes a viernes de 8:00 a 14:00 hrs.

• Ubicación: Polanco, Ciudad de México.

description:
About the job

About SAMY

SAMY is the global powerhouse leading the evolution of brand communication. We help brands matter in a social-first world through research, creativity, technology, and integrated influencer marketing to deliver impactful, data-driven solutions and drive growth for brands. With over 1.000 employees in 15+ offices across 18 countries (Europe, U.S., Latin America) and operating in 55 markets, SAMY serves over 100 leading clients, specializing in award-winning, end-to-end digital campaigns.

Mission

We are looking for a highly creative Social Media Video Editor & Content Creator who lives and breathes digital storytelling. This isn't just about "editing video"—it’s about understanding the pulse of the internet. You are a "hook master" who knows how to turn raw footage into scroll-stopping content that drives engagement. You will be responsible for the end-to-end creative process: from capturing high-quality mobile/professional footage to post-producing high-impact pieces. You will collaborate with designers and copywriters to ensure our brands don’t just exist on social media, but lead the conversation.

Job Functions


Plan, capture, and execute photo and video shoots optimized for social-first platforms, ensuring impeccable lighting, framing, and visual storytelling.
Edit and post-produce high-energy videos for TikTok, Reels, and YouTube, mastering narrative pacing and retention techniques.
Develop 2D motion graphics and dynamic typography that enhance the storytelling and ensure the message lands even without sound.
Partner with Art Directors and Copywriters to transform "big ideas" into integrated social campaigns, from initial concept to final optimization.
Leverage Generative AI tools for creative support, using them to streamline workflows, experiment with visual styles, and enhance ideation.
Stay at the forefront of social trends, viral 


,


Experience creating, filming, and editing content for TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Shorts.
Advanced knowledge of video editing, digital storytelling, hooks, and audience retention techniques.
Proficiency in tools such as Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, and Generative AI tools.
Experience with 2D motion graphics, dynamic typography, and social-first content post-production.
Strong understanding of digital trends, internet culture, memes, and viral content formats.
Experience collaborating with creative teams in advertising agencies, digital content, or social media campaigns.


Cultural Fit

Beyond experience, we look for people who truly connect with the way we work

We are kind and direct, communicating clearly, honestly, and respectfully.

We collaborate without silos or egos, valuing collective success and recognizing that every idea counts.

We give feedback that helps others grow, learning from each other and celebrating progress.

We take pride in our work, paying attention to detail and committing to excellence.

And we take ownership of what we build, showing initiative, responsibility, and delivering real results.

We thrive with people who are kind, collaborative, driven by excellence, and committed to making an impact. If this sounds like you, you’ll thrive at SAMY.

Diversity and Inclusion

At SAMY, we believe in real diversity: teams where each person contributes from their uniqueness. We are committed to creating an inclusive, accessible, and barrier-free environment where every voice matters.

We welcome applicants of all abilities and backgrounds. If you need any adjustments during the recruitment process or in your daily work, please let us know. We want you to thrive on an equal footing.

Benefits


Flexible schedule and hybrid work options that help you balance your time and work in a way that fits your life.
A geographic mobility plan that gives you the chance to explore new opportunities and work from different SAMY locations around the world.
Celebrate your birthday with a day off, and take time to enjoy December 24th and 31st as company holidays to relax, recharge, and enjoy what matters most.
Global social and environmental activities that allow you to take part in initiatives that create a positive impact under the OWN THE IMPACT framework, connecting with colleagues from around the world and contributing to projects that make a difference.
Soft Return lets you transition back to work at your own pace, celebrate new family members with fellow working parents, and get expert coaching for first-time parents.
Mirror Club is our mentoring program designed to accelerate the careers of talented women by connecting them with experienced mentors.
Global Referral Program that lets you refer clients, projects, or teammates, helping SAMY grow stronger while earning rewards for your contributions

title: Electrical Product Marketing Specialist for Medium Voltage
location: San Luis Potosí, San Luis Potosí, Mexico (On-site)
skills: Collaborate with management to define strategic marketing plans and support relevant implementation, including communication and support to the business units to translate it into a relevant marketing strategy. Collects data and provides sound market and competitor intelligence analyses related to global markets and trends. Tracks and provides global market research and analysis results, identifying existing gaps or new growth opportunities.

Monitor market trends and accordingly recommends improvements in the marketing strategy and plans to meet changing market and competitive landscapes. Provides appropriate market information to support long- to mid-term decision-making on the marketing strategy.
Provide support in defining the end-user value proposition and communicates it to the target segment, both internal and external.
Drive sales efficiency by ensuring every salesperson possesses appropriate product and tool knowledge, including both technical and sales aspects.
Visit customers to understand their needs and ensures the resolution of customer issues.
Support proposals team, by suggesting and providing best available product(s)/solution(s) while appropriately addressing technical and commercial considerations for each individual opportunity.

Bachelor’s degree in Electrical, Electromechanical, or Mechatronics Engineering, or a related field. Candidates must provide official documentation certifying completion of their degree (e.g., degree certificate, professional license, or official graduation letter).

5+ years of experience in Marketing, Sales, Pricing, Business Development or Engineering, working as a Business Development Manager, Sales Engineer, Proposals Specialist, or similar, with Electrification products.
Demonstrated experience working with Enterprise Resource Planning and Standard Operating Procedures.
Sound knowledge of quotations and proposals, as well as understanding of exports and the international market.
Advanced English Level is a must.
Travel up to 70%. Candidates must already have a work authorization that would permit them to work for ABB in the US.
description:
About the job

En ABB, ayudamos a las industrias a funcionar de forma más eficiente y limpia, y cada una de las personas que trabajan aquí lo hace posible. Estarás capacitado para liderar, apoyado para crecer y orgulloso del impacto que creamos juntos. Únete a nosotros y ayuda a que funcione lo que hace funcionar el mundo.

Este Puesto Reporta a

Product Market Manager

__

Your Role And Responsibilities

In this role, you will coordinate sales activities, events, proposals, and market research to meet business goals and increase market share. This role will be focused on International Markets (Canada, CA&C, Europe, Middle East, and Asia Pacific regions). Working within the Grid Components group of Electrification Distribution Solutions in Mexico and providing support to Pinetops, North Carolina, you will be responsible for implementing product marketing strategies aligned with the global product strategy.

The work model for the role is: - Onsite

This role is contributing to Electrification - Distribution Solutions Division in Mexico and providing support to Pinetops, North Carolina.

You Will Be Mainly Accountable To


Collaborate with management to define strategic marketing plans and support relevant implementation, including communication and support to the business units to translate it into a relevant marketing strategy. Collects data and provides sound market and competitor intelligence analyses related to global markets and trends. Tracks and provides global market research and analysis results, identifying existing gaps or new growth opportunities.
Monitor market trends and accordingly recommends improvements in the marketing strategy and plans to meet changing market and competitive landscapes. Provides appropriate market information to support long- to mid-term decision-making on the marketing strategy.
Provide support in defining the end-user value proposition and communicates it to the target segment, both internal and external.
Drive sales efficiency by ensuring every salesperson possesses appropriate product and tool knowledge, including both technical and sales aspects.
Visit customers to understand their needs and ensures the resolution of customer issues.
Support proposals team, by suggesting and providing best available product(s)/solution(s) while appropriately addressing technical and commercial considerations for each individual opportunity.


Our team dynamics

You will join a dynamic, talented, and high performing team, where you will be able to thrive.

Qualifications For The Role


Bachelor’s degree in Electrical, Electromechanical, or Mechatronics Engineering, or a related field. Candidates must provide official documentation certifying completion of their degree (e.g., degree certificate, professional license, or official graduation letter). 
5+ years of experience in Marketing, Sales, Pricing, Business Development or Engineering, working as a Business Development Manager, Sales Engineer, Proposals Specialist, or similar, with Electrification products.
Demonstrated experience working with Enterprise Resource Planning and Standard Operating Procedures.
Sound knowledge of quotations and proposals, as well as understanding of exports and the international market.
Advanced English Level is a must.
Travel up to 70%. Candidates must already have a work authorization that would permit them to work for ABB in the US.


More About Us

ABB's Distribution Solutions Division facilitates the efficient and reliable distribution, protection and control of power by improving electric power quality while strengthening the resilience of the grid.

Construir un futuro más limpio e inteligente requiere todo tipo de mentes: las curiosas, las valientes y las creativas. Por eso acogemos a personas de todos los orígenes y experiencias.

¿Listo para causar impacto?

Presenta tu candidatura hoy mismo o visita https://www.abb.com para saber más sobre el impacto de nuestras soluciones en todo el mundo.

description:
About the job

Descripción del puesto En el puesto de Especialista en CRM y automatización en Centro SanaMente te encargarás de diseñar, configurar y optimizar flujos de trabajo automatizados para la gestión de personas usuarias y pacientes potenciales. En tu día a día segmentarás bases de datos, crearás campañas automatizadas (emails, recordatorios, seguimientos) y monitorizarás su rendimiento para proponer mejoras continuas. Colaborarás con los equipos de marketing y atención al paciente para definir procesos, mejorar la experiencia de la persona usuaria y aumentar la conversión y fidelización. También documentarás los procesos, elaborarás informes periódicos y ayudarás a implementar nuevas herramientas o integraciones relacionadas con el CRM. Este es un puesto de media jornada (part time) y se desarrolla en modalidad remota.




Lo que necesitamos:

Configuración y optimización de flujos en WATI (WhatsApp Business API)
Diseño e implementación de secuencias de email marketing (Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign o similar)
Criterio para adaptar los mensajes a una audiencia que viene a buscar apoyo psicológico — no cualquier tono sirve aquí
Aptitudes analíticas: capacidad para interpretar datos, extraer conclusiones accionables y proponer optimizaciones basadas en métricas y KPIs.
Gestión de relaciones con personas usuarias y ventas: experiencia en Customer Relationship Management (CRM) y en procesos de ventas orientados a la fidelización y al acompañamiento personalizado.
Comunicación y trabajo colaborativo: excelentes habilidades de comunicación escrita y verbal, así como capacidad para coordinarte con equipos multidisciplinares de forma remota.
Gestión de proyectos: aptitudes en Project Management para planificar, priorizar y hacer seguimiento de iniciativas de automatización y mejora de procesos.




Requisitos no negociables:

Basado/a en México
Facturación activa (RFC con actividad económica vigente) — indispensable para formalizar la colaboración

Lo que ofrecemos:

Colaboración recurrente part-time con pago por honorarios
Autonomía real en las decisiones técnicas dentro de tu área




Si cumples los requisitos y te interesa, escríbeme por mensaje directo incluyendo: tu tarifa para la configuración inicial de WATI y tu esquema de cobro para secuencias de email (por proyecto, por hora o como lo manejes). Eso nos permite avanzar rápido.
