description:
About the job

Sobre nosotros

En Koltin, estamos rediseñando la forma en que cuidamos a nuestros papás, mamás, abuelos y abuelas, con el objetivo de ayudarles a mantenerse saludables, activos e independientes durante el mayor tiempo posible. Lo hacemos a través de nuestras membresías de salud, que integran:

Atención clínica enfocada en la prevención
Cobertura médica de gastos mayores
Programas de bienestar y comunidad

Somos la primera empresa en México que protege a personas adultas mayores, desde los 50 hasta los 84 años. Estamos creciendo rápidamente en todo el país, con un propósito claro: transformar la experiencia de salud para las Grandes Personas, haciéndola más humana, accesible y digna.




Sobre el puesto

Forma parte del equipo de Lifecycle, el área que convierte el backlog de leads de Koltin en ventas. Tu trabajo es en conjunto con el líder del área armar la estrategia y llevar a cabo la ejecución: operar los flujos de CRM, contactar leads en el momento correcto y asegurarse de que los que están listos para comprar lleguen al equipo de ventas.

Este no es un rol de soporte. Es un rol de conversión. Cada lead que reactiva y lleva al equipo de ventas representa una venta real — y eso se mide cada semana.




Responsabilidades

Ejecutar los flujos de reactivación del backlog diariamente según el playbook del Lead de CRM
Contactar leads de forma proactiva por los canales definidos (email, WhatsApp, llamada)
Calificar leads: identificar quién está listo para pasar al equipo de guías de ventas
Registrar todas las interacciones en HubSpot con precisión — tus datos alimentan las decisiones del equipo
Detectar qué mensajes y acciones funcionan mejor y reportarlo al Lead de CRM
Proponer mejoras al playbook cuando algo no funciona




Eres un buen fit si eres una persona que tiene

1-2 años en CRM, data analytics
Experiencia con HubSpot u otra herramienta de CRM
Orden y detalle: registras bien, no te saltas pasos
Comunicación escrita clara, empática y adaptada al segmento 60+
Capacidad de manejar volumen sin perder calidad de contacto
Orientación a resultados: sabes si te está yendo bien o no
Autonomía para priorizar sin que te digan qué hacer cada hora
Apertura para aprender e iterar rápido
Deseable: manejo de SQL




Que te ofrecemos

Rol con impacto directo — tus acciones se ven en el número de ventas cada semana
Equipo chico con dinámica de startup: aprendizaje rápido, decisión ágil
Remoto 100%
Sueldo competitivo + variable por meta de conversión
Proyección clara: este rol puede crecer hacia lead de CRM o roles de growth




Beneficios residiendo en México

🎓 Acceso a herramientas y beneficios para tu crecimiento profesional, como cursos, talleres, libros, etc.
💊 Asistencia médica privada por videollamada (médico general, nutriólogo y psicólogo) ilimitado para ti y 3 familiares
🏈 Acceso a herramientas para tu cuidado físico (TotalPass)

title: Partnerships Associate
description:
About the job

Hiring: Partnerships Associate for Million Dollar Sellers, a top-tier ecommerce community.




You’ll own the full partner lifecycle, close new partners, then make sure every commitment runs cleanly.


ABOUT MDS

An exclusive community of 700+ seven- and eight-figure Amazon and ecommerce founders. $12B+ in combined member sales. Nearly 100 events per year. Backed by industry-leading partners.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

— Identify and close new partners across affiliates, event sponsorships, and community offerings, owning outreach from first contact to signed agreement

— Onboard every new partner completely into the database, app listing, newsletter, offers, and deliverable tracker before anyone has to ask

— Track and execute all partner deliverables across events, campaigns, and affiliate programs so nothing promised slips

— Send the weekly Partners Newsletter every Tuesday and maintain the partner database, contracts, offers, and KPI tracking

— Produce AI-powered Community Pulse summaries surfacing partner mentions and insights from across community channels


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

— Experience in partnerships, sales, or BD, with a track record of closing deals, not just managing them

— Equally comfortable sending a cold outreach email and cleaning up a database

— Operational discipline: you onboard fully, track deliverables proactively, and treat the database as a live system, not an archive

— Familiarity with CRMs and ops tools, Airtable, ClickUp, SignNow, or similar

— Comfort using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) as part of your regular workflow

— Strong written English, you’ll be writing outreach, a weekly newsletter, and partner comms

— Based in LATAM (Mexico, Argentina preferred). Travel required minimum 3x per year

— Available 10AM–3PM EST core hours




COMPENSATION

— USD $2,000–$3,000/month (band reflects balance of sales track record and operational depth)

— Tiered bonus plan tied to annual revenue goals

— Long-term, multi-year engagement

— Direct line to the VP of Revenue




HOW TO APPLY

Apply through our form: https://forms.clickup.com/90161589637/f/2kz0tbc5-516/HN6BGAJ1CDZMH3QDD7




You’ll need: CV, a Loom intro, and 5 minutes.

We respond to every applicant within 48 hours.

title: Especialista Comercial - Mercado Ads
skills: Vibran energía emprendedora: se mueven por la curiosidad, nunca se rinden y se enfocan en superar sus propios límites.

Identificar nuevas oportunidades de negocio y ejecutar planes de acción comerciales y de upselling, presentando soluciones personalizadas y creativas a lo largo del funnel de usuario, colaborando con equipos cross-funcionales para potenciar el crecimiento de las marcas.Crear alianzas estratégicas con stakeholders clave, como los ejecutivos de cuenta del Marketplace.

title: Email Marketing Account Manager
skills: You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent
Minh Vo - Founder
description:
About the job

I’m helping Email Clout find a top candidate to join their team flexible for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager.




You'll drive revenue and client success by independently managing end-to-end email marketing campaigns.




Compensation:

USD 300 - 1.5K/month




Location:

Remote: Mexico




Mission of Email Clout:

"Empower online brands with high-impact, revenue-driving email campaigns. Fast, accountable, and world-class results."




What makes you a strong candidate:

You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent




Responsibilities and more:

Email Clout is an email marketing agency that partners with online brands to create unique, engaging, and revenue-generating email campaigns and flows. We’re fully remote, small, and love to move fast. We hold ourselves accountable for delivering a world-class client experience and industry-shattering email performance. 




We are looking for the ideal candidate for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager, who will be responsible for the experience and performance of client accounts. In this role, you will manage and execute email marketing campaigns and flows from start to finish. This includes coming up with ideas, planning, writing copy, communicating with clients and internal teams, as well as implementation in Klaviyo. You will use Klaviyo and Figma while managing your tasks independently through Notion. Below are the key responsibilities for this role. 




- Create and manage multiple email content calendars. 

- Plan, write, and schedule email marketing campaigns and flows. 

- Collect, report, present, and analyze past data to make the best decisions for clients. 

- Conduct and lead client calls. 

- Handle difficult questions related to email performance. 

- Make design and copy changes in Figma. 

- Collaborate and manage designers and copywriters. 

- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in email marketing. 




Software stack you’ll be using: 

- Slack 

- Klaviyo 

- Figma 

- Shopify 

- Notion 




Requirements: 

- 1-2 years of experience in email marketing, preferably with experience using Klaviyo. 

- Proficiency in Figma or similar design software. 

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 

- Strong attention to detail and multitasking ability. 

- Familiarity with email marketing best practices and metrics. 

- Confident in communicating with clients. 

- Perfect English (spoken and written). 




Do Not Apply If: 

- You’re okay with delays or errors in client work. 

- You’re willing to work only during regular hours. 

- You can only write when assisted by ChatGPT. 

- You don’t take deadlines seriously. 

- You lack urgency in completing work. 

- You don’t have the resourcefulness to solve problems on your own first. 

- You don’t feel confident in your email marketing abilities.




Your potential leader(s):

Minh Vo - Founder



Desired Skills and Experience

Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting, Client communication, Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma

title: Senior Commercial Market Specialist (m/f/d)
skills: Monitor and analyze regional performance, competitor dynamics, and demand patterns for the North America market, turning data into strategic recommendations.
Own fare management for the region: define regional pricing settings, fallback logic, and verify implementation across the network.
Support the design and execution of commercial activities — promotions, marketing campaigns, A/B tests, and sales initiatives — aligned with regional strategy.
Build and maintain a country-specific campaign calendar (email, social media, and other channels).
Develop and manage briefings for Marketing & Sales channels, including budget tracking and bi-weekly syncs.
Identify revenue and customer flow opportunities: social discounts, special products, customer segments, and willingness-to-pay insights.
Stay ahead of market trends: track the competitive landscape, macroeconomic shifts, regulatory changes, and network dynamics across the region.
Contribute to topline forecasts (weekly and monthly updates) and propose data-driven improvements.
Collect North America-specific e-commerce needs, build business cases, and present recommendations to leadership.
Lead or contribute to cross-functional projects, acting as subject matter expert or project manager on specific commercial topics.
Leverage AI tools and automation to streamline processes and improve commercial efficiency.
Bachelor's degree in Economics, Finance, Mathematics, Business, or a related field.
2–4 years of experience in commercial analysis, revenue management, or business development — ideally in transportation, airlines, hospitality, beverages, or a similarly dynamic industry.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to go beyond the numbers: you design solutions, not just reports.
A natural connector who actively seeks input from stakeholders, builds relationships across teams, and is not afraid to knock on doors to get things done.
Strategic thinker who can navigate fast-changing macro environments (cost shifts, demand fluctuations, competitive moves) with adaptability and clarity.
Proactive and ownership-driven: you set your own goals, follow through on commitments, and hold yourself accountable to financial targets and project deliverables.
Curious about markets — you want to understand North America's geography, network, and customer dynamics, not just analyze spreadsheets.
Collaborative and a strong team player, with excellent communication and presentation skills for senior stakeholders.
Comfortable with ambiguity and freedom; you do not need constant guidance to deliver results.
Fluent in English (additional languages are a plus).
Interest or experience in AI-powered tools and process automation is a strong advantage.
Travel perks: 12 free Flix vouchers + 12 discount vouchers for friends & family.
Work from (M)Anywhere: Depending on your role, work from another location for up to 60 days per year.
Hybrid work model: We are an office-first company, but we offer flexibility to balance work and life.
Wellbeing support: Access confidential 1:1 counselling, courses, and stress management for yourself and up to four family members.
Learning & Development: Take advantage of language classes, training courses, and expert-led sessions to grow your skills.
Mentoring Program: Connect with experienced colleagues to gain insights and accelerate your career.
description:
About the job

At Flix, we offer a dynamic work environment with competitive pay, strong growth opportunities, and a tech-driven approach to making travel more accessible, sustainable, and affordable

We are looking for a Senior Commercial Market Specialist (m/f/d) to join our North America commercial team. This is not a purely analytical role — we need someone who combines strong analytical thinking with the ability to design and implement solutions, build bridges across stakeholders, and take ownership of results. You will interact directly with senior leadership, including the CEO for North America, and shape the commercial strategy of one of the world's fastest-growing mobility networks.

About The Role


Monitor and analyze regional performance, competitor dynamics, and demand patterns for the North America market, turning data into strategic recommendations.
Own fare management for the region: define regional pricing settings, fallback logic, and verify implementation across the network.
Support the design and execution of commercial activities — promotions, marketing campaigns, A/B tests, and sales initiatives — aligned with regional strategy.
Build and maintain a country-specific campaign calendar (email, social media, and other channels).
Develop and manage briefings for Marketing & Sales channels, including budget tracking and bi-weekly syncs.
Identify revenue and customer flow opportunities: social discounts, special products, customer segments, and willingness-to-pay insights.
Stay ahead of market trends: track the competitive landscape, macroeconomic shifts, regulatory changes, and network dynamics across the region.
Contribute to topline forecasts (weekly and monthly updates) and propose data-driven improvements.
Collect North America-specific e-commerce needs, build business cases, and present recommendations to leadership.
Lead or contribute to cross-functional projects, acting as subject matter expert or project manager on specific commercial topics.
Leverage AI tools and automation to streamline processes and improve commercial efficiency.


About You


Bachelor's degree in Economics, Finance, Mathematics, Business, or a related field.
2–4 years of experience in commercial analysis, revenue management, or business development — ideally in transportation, airlines, hospitality, beverages, or a similarly dynamic industry.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to go beyond the numbers: you design solutions, not just reports.
A natural connector who actively seeks input from stakeholders, builds relationships across teams, and is not afraid to knock on doors to get things done.
Strategic thinker who can navigate fast-changing macro environments (cost shifts, demand fluctuations, competitive moves) with adaptability and clarity.
Proactive and ownership-driven: you set your own goals, follow through on commitments, and hold yourself accountable to financial targets and project deliverables.
Curious about markets — you want to understand North America's geography, network, and customer dynamics, not just analyze spreadsheets.
Collaborative and a strong team player, with excellent communication and presentation skills for senior stakeholders.
Comfortable with ambiguity and freedom; you do not need constant guidance to deliver results.
Fluent in English (additional languages are a plus).
Interest or experience in AI-powered tools and process automation is a strong advantage.


We recognize that everyone carries a unique set of valuable skills and experiences. If you think you could have an impact even though you don't meet 100% of the requirements, we still encourage you to apply. We want to hear from you! 

What We Offer


Travel perks: 12 free Flix vouchers + 12 discount vouchers for friends & family. 
Work from (M)Anywhere: Depending on your role, work from another location for up to 60 days per year. 
Hybrid work model: We are an office-first company, but we offer flexibility to balance work and life. 
Wellbeing support: Access confidential 1:1 counselling, courses, and stress management for yourself and up to four family members. 
Learning & Development: Take advantage of language classes, training courses, and expert-led sessions to grow your skills. 
Mentoring Program: Connect with experienced colleagues to gain insights and accelerate your career. 


To view more local benefits specific to each office location, please check out this link: Locations - Flix Career

Why Join Flix?

At Flix, you’ll find teams that rally together to overcome challenges and spark creativity. We believe in ownership culture - giving you the freedom to take initiative, make an impact, and shape your own career path.

As we continue to expand across the globe, you can make a real difference in how we work.

If you’re ready to grow and lead your journey, Flix is the place for you!

description:
About the job

Business Developer Executive | DICKA Logistics




En DICKA Logistics nos encontramos en búsqueda de talento para integrarse a nuestro equipo comercial como Business Developer Executive.




Buscamos una persona con experiencia en el sector logístico, preferentemente en empresas 3PL, transporte, distribución, freight forwarding o soluciones integrales de cadena de suministro.




La posición requiere conocimiento del proceso comercial end to end, desde la prospección de nuevos clientes hasta el cierre de oportunidades, asegurando una adecuada identificación de necesidades, construcción de propuestas, análisis de viabilidad operativa y seguimiento puntual de cada oportunidad comercial.




Principales responsabilidades:
Prospectar y desarrollar nuevas oportunidades de negocio en el sector logístico.
Identificar necesidades de clientes en servicios 3PL, transporte, distribución, almacenaje o soluciones logísticas integrales.
Gestionar el ciclo completo de venta: prospección, diagnóstico, propuesta, negociación y cierre.
Elaborar, analizar y dar seguimiento a cotizaciones comerciales.
Participar en procesos de pricing, análisis de tarifas, costos y márgenes.
Coordinarse con áreas operativas para asegurar que las soluciones ofrecidas sean viables y rentables.
Dar seguimiento a clientes actuales y potenciales, fortaleciendo relaciones comerciales de largo plazo.
Asegurar una correcta transición entre la oportunidad comercial cerrada y la ejecución operativa del servicio.




Perfil requerido:
Experiencia en ventas B2B dentro del sector logístico.
Conocimiento en empresas 3PL, transporte, distribución o freight forwarding.
Experiencia en prospección, negociación, cotización y cierre comercial.
Entendimiento operativo de transporte terrestre, almacenaje, distribución o soluciones logísticas.
Capacidad de análisis para evaluar tarifas, costos, márgenes y rentabilidad.
Orientación a resultados, seguimiento estructurado y enfoque al cliente.




En logística, una venta no termina con una firma: comienza cuando la promesa comercial se convierte en una operación cumplida.




Buscamos a una persona con visión comercial, sensibilidad operativa y capacidad para construir relaciones de negocio sostenibles.




Las personas interesadas pueden postularse o compartir esta publicación con perfiles alineados a la posición.

#DICKALogistics #BusinessDeveloper #BusinessDevelopment #VentasB2B #Logística #3PL #Transporte #SupplyChain #Pricing #DesarrolloDeNegocios #TalentoComercial #Hiring

description:
About the job

Sobre nosotros

En Koltin, estamos rediseñando la forma en que cuidamos a nuestros papás, mamás, abuelos y abuelas, con el objetivo de ayudarles a mantenerse saludables, activos e independientes durante el mayor tiempo posible. Lo hacemos a través de nuestras membresías de salud, que integran:

Atención clínica enfocada en la prevención
Cobertura médica de gastos mayores
Programas de bienestar y comunidad

Somos la primera empresa en México que protege a personas adultas mayores, desde los 50 hasta los 84 años. Estamos creciendo rápidamente en todo el país, con un propósito claro: transformar la experiencia de salud para las Grandes Personas, haciéndola más humana, accesible y digna.




Sobre el Puesto

Koltin tiene miles de leads que ya conocen el producto, mostraron interés y no compraron. Ese backlog es el activo más eficiente del negocio — el costo de adquisición ya fue pagado. Hoy está subutilizado. Tu trabajo es convertirlo en ventas reales con un sistema data-driven.

Tu meta en septiembre: 860 leads del backlog convertidos en venta — el 56% del total de ventas de Koltin. El rol es 100% data-driven: cada decisión se toma con números. Si construís el sistema y lo hacés escalar, el rol crece con vos.




Responsabilidades

Diseñar la estrategia de reactivación del backlog: segmentación, scoring, mensajes y timing
Construir y mantener el modelo de conversión: analizar variables que predicen quién va a comprar y cuando
Definir las metas de conversión mensuales, medir el funnel end-to-end y reportar a la VP de Growth
Diseñar y optimizar flujos de CRM en HubSpot — automatizaciones, triggers, secuencias — con foco en D+30+
Explorar e implementar herramientas de AI para escalar el contacto sin perder personalización (AI SDR, scoring automatico, generación de mensajes)
Construir dashboards de conversión que le den visibilidad al equipo en tiempo real
Gestionar al ejecutor de CRM: asignar prioridades, revisar calidad de ejecución, dar feedback
Trabajar con el equipo de ventas para asegurar que los leads que pasan estén listos para cerrar
Construir el playbook de lifecycle — documentado y automatizado — que escale sin depender de vos




Eres un buen fit si eres una persona que tiene

3+ años en CRM, lifecycle o growth con foco en conversión
Experiencia construyendo flujos de nurturing y automatizaciones desde cero
Manejo avanzado de HubSpot u otra herramienta de CRM
Sólido en análisis de datos: sabes leer un funnel, identificar dónde se cae la conversión y actuar sobre eso
SQL o Python para análisis propio — no dependes de un analista para cada pregunta
Experiencia con herramientas de BI (Metabase, Looker, Power BI o similar)
Conocimiento o curiosidad real en AI aplicada a CRM: scoring automático, AI SDR, generación de mensajes
Experiencia liderando equipos pequeños o coordinando colaboradores
Mentalidad de dueño: te importa el resultado, no la actividad
Deseable: experiencia en salud, seguros o productos de alto ticket




Que te ofrecemos

Rol con impacto directo en el negocio — tus decisiones se ven en los números la semana siguiente
Equipo chico, decisión rápida, sin burocracia
Crecimiento real: este rol tiene proyección clara hacia liderazgo de toda el área de Lifecycle
Remoto 100% — trabajo asíncrono con reuniones sincrónicas focalizadas
Sueldo competitivo + variable por meta de conversión




Cómo medimos tu éxito

Leads del backlog convertidos en venta (meta mensual creciente)

About the job

Flexible workload depending on project availability

description:
About the job

Launch Your Next Successful Chapter with Veta Virtual! 🚀




💸 Competitive Salary in USD | 🌍 100% Remote | 🎯 Paid Search & Social Role | 🏆 Award-Winning Agency Culture




Veta Virtual is hiring a Paid Search & Social Specialist for a high-growth client in the Digital Marketing industry — an award-winning agency specializing in the automotive vertical, recognized as Best Large SEO Agency and winner of Best Low Budget PPC Campaign at the 2024 US Search Awards. This is a learning-forward role for someone curious, resourceful, and ready to run real campaigns that push what is possible.




🔑 Your Role:




You will manage and optimize paid search and social campaigns for automotive dealership clients — trained and mentored by top specialists while taking real ownership of results. Your day-to-day will involve:




Managing and optimizing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns — delivering higher ROI and lower cost per conversion for automotive dealership clients.
Conducting daily account audits, budget pacing, and campaign adjustments to keep performance on track and spend optimized.
Generating performance reports from Google Ads and Meta — and conducting client calls to present strategies and results clearly and confidently.
Managing OEM reimbursement processes — reviewing requirements, gathering materials, and submitting claims accurately and on time.
Using Google Analytics, Data Studio, Tag Manager, Merchant Center, and Meta Ads Manager to analyze data and drive campaign improvements.
Collaborating with SEOs, writers, and designers on new experiments and client work — contributing to a team that tests, learns, and pushes boundaries daily.




✅ What You'll Need:




1+ year of hands-on Google Ads experience — able to build, manage, and optimize paid search campaigns confidently.
1+ year of Meta Ads experience — proficient in Facebook and Instagram campaign setup, targeting, and optimization inside Ads Manager.
Working knowledge of Google Analytics, Google Data Studio, Google Ads Editor, Google Tag Manager, and Google Merchant Center.
Prior agency experience — you understand client management, reporting, and the pace of agency work.
Detail-oriented, research-driven, and a strong communicator in written and spoken English.
Bonus: automotive vertical experience, OEM reimbursement knowledge, or campaigns you can show us with real results.
To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.




💼 What We Offer:




💸 Competitive salary in USD — paid consistently every month.
🌴 10 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. federal holidays.
💻 100% remote — open to candidates based in LATAM or Europe.
📈 Direct mentorship from top paid media specialists — real room to grow and own your campaigns inside a fast-moving agency.
🏆 A high-performance, collaborative culture where testing, learning, and pushing boundaries are part of daily life.
🤝 A supportive environment through Veta Virtual and our client where curiosity is rewarded and your growth is taken seriously from day one.




Ready to Apply?




If you are ready to run real campaigns, learn from the best, and grow inside one of the most innovative digital marketing agencies in the automotive space — apply now and launch your next chapter with Veta Virtual!




Once you apply, you will complete a short 2-minute video question — come ready to tell us about campaigns you have run and results you have driven. We can't wait to meet you!

title: Community Manager
description:
About the job

Job Title: Community Manager




Job Type: Full-time




Location: Remote - Latin America




Job Summary:




Join our team as a dynamic Community Manager and play a pivotal role in creating a positive, collaborative, and engaged online environment. You will be at the forefront of customer support and community moderation, proactively resolving issues, answering questions, and ensuring a welcoming experience for all members. Preferred Qualifications:

• Passion for building lasting relationships and driving positive user experiences.

description:
About the job

Introduction

Position: AI-Powered Lead Generation Specialist
Schedule: Part-Time, 20+ hours per week, with potential to grow into a full-time role
Location: Remote
Preferred Region: Latin America




Overview

If you're passionate about sales, automation, AI, and building meaningful connections, this is an opportunity to combine all four in a fast-growing environment.

Our client is a leadership, mental performance, and athlete development business dedicated to helping young athletes improve their confidence, mindset, leadership, and overall performance. Through a combination of coaching, mentorship, and proven systems, the organization empowers athletes to unlock their full potential both in sports and in life.

They are seeking a tech-savvy and results-driven AI-Powered Lead Generation Specialist to help build and manage their Instagram lead generation system. This role combines appointment setting, lead nurturing, CRM management, and AI automation. You'll play a key role in optimizing conversations, qualifying prospects, and helping drive business growth through scalable systems and meaningful engagement.




Key Responsibilities

Set up, manage, and optimize ManyChat automation workflows for Instagram lead generation
Integrate Claude AI with ManyChat to create personalized and scalable DM conversations
Monitor and manage AI-driven conversations to ensure prospects receive accurate and timely responses
Qualify incoming leads and determine fit based on company criteria
Conduct introductory qualification calls with athletes and parents when necessary
Book qualified appointments and strategy calls for the founder
Follow up with prospects through Instagram DMs and additional communication channels
Maintain accurate prospect records, notes, and follow-up activities within company systems
Track lead generation and appointment-setting performance metrics
Identify opportunities to improve automation workflows, response rates, and conversion rates
Collaborate directly with leadership to refine messaging, objection handling, and lead qualification processes
Test and optimize AI prompts, automation sequences, and conversation flows
Assist with future lead generation initiatives across additional channels as the company grows




Must-Have Requirements

3+ years of experience in appointment setting, lead generation, sales development, or outbound prospecting
Experience working with Instagram outreach and direct message conversations
Experience using CRM systems and lead tracking tools
Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal
Experience qualifying leads and booking appointments
Highly organized with strong attention to detail and follow-through
Comfortable learning and implementing AI tools and automation platforms
Self-motivated and capable of working independently in a remote environment
Strong problem-solving abilities and technical aptitude
Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup




Nice-to-Have Requirements

Experience with ManyChat automation
Experience integrating Claude AI, ChatGPT, or other AI platforms into business workflows
Background in sales automation, chatbot management, or conversational marketing
Experience with HubSpot, GoHighLevel, or similar CRM platforms
Understanding of social media marketing and audience engagement strategies
Experience supporting high-ticket coaching, consulting, or service-based businesses
Athletic background or previous experience participating in competitive sports, with the ability to relate to and effectively communicate with athletes




Why Join Us

This is an opportunity to join a growing coaching business that is making a meaningful impact on young athletes both on and off the field. You'll work directly with leadership, contribute to the development of scalable lead generation systems, and have the chance to blend sales, relationship-building, AI, and automation into one dynamic role.

If you enjoy taking ownership, improving processes, experimenting with new technology, and helping drive growth through meaningful conversations, you'll have the opportunity to make a real impact while growing alongside the business. As the company continues to expand, so will the opportunities to take on greater responsibility and advance your career.

Resourceful problem solver who takes initiative without waiting for direction
Quick learner who adapts easily to new technologies and workflows

description:
About the job

IMPORTANT - Watch this quick Loom video on how to get hired:

https://www.loom.com/share/345f776084e642ba99c24aabe40a67a0

C1 ENGLISH LEVEL IS REQUIRED, THE SELECTED CANDIDATE WILL BE SPEAKING STRICTLY IN ENGLISH DURING THEIR WHOLE SHIFT.

PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND AUDIO RECORDING IN ENGLISH




JOB TITLE

Outbound Lead Generation Specialist – Tech & AI

JOB ID

BALRIC1

INDUSTRY

Technology (AI Consulting)

LOCATION

LATAM / South Africa / Egypt (Strong English required)

JOB STATUS

Part Time to start (~20 hours per week) with a clear path to Full-Time based on alignment, performance, and mutual trust.

WORK SCHEDULE

Monday to Friday, Morning slot EST

SALARY

LATAM: $7 - $9 per hour + commissions

South Africa: $8 - $10 per hour + commissions

TARGET START DATE

ASAP




ROLE OVERVIEW




About the Client:

The client is an AI consulting and custom software development company focused on building advanced AI powered solutions for businesses ranging from small companies to enterprise level organizations. Their services include custom AI systems, onboarding, training, consulting, and implementation support tailored to each client’s operational needs. The company works in a highly consultative B2B environment with high ticket services and a strong focus on relationship building, strategic communication, and long term client success. Their team values initiative, critical thinking, adaptability, and a strong sense of ownership.







About the Role:

The client is seeking a highly proactive and results driven AI Sales & Lead Generation Specialist to help generate and close new business opportunities for the company. This role combines outbound lead generation, prospecting, appointment setting, and consultative sales within the AI and custom software development space. The ideal candidate is someone who thrives in fast paced environments, takes initiative without constant supervision, learns new technologies quickly, and is motivated by performance and growth opportunities. This position will start part time with a clear opportunity to grow into a full time role based on performance and results.




Key Responsibilities




Lead Generation & Prospecting

Identify and research potential B2B clients using platforms such as LinkedIn, Apollo, Clay, and other lead generation tools
Build targeted prospect lists aligned with the client’s ideal customer profile
Conduct outbound outreach through LinkedIn, email campaigns, and cold calling
Generate qualified leads and schedule appointments with decision makers

Sales & Client Communication

Conduct discovery conversations with prospects to understand business needs and pain points
Present the client’s AI and custom software solutions in a clear and consultative manner
Handle objections confidently and maintain professional follow up communication
Support sales conversations and potentially assist with closing high ticket deals
Maintain ongoing communication with prospects throughout the sales cycle

CRM & Process Management

Accurately document client interactions, requirements, and sales progress within the company CRM system
Organize prospect and client information using Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, Asana, and internal systems
Collaborate with the internal development and operations teams to ensure smooth handoff of client requirements

Performance & Initiative

Continuously look for ways to improve outreach strategies and lead generation efforts
Take initiative to solve problems independently and maintain momentum without waiting for instructions
Adapt quickly to new software, systems, and technologies introduced by the company
Focus on measurable business outcomes and revenue generation rather than task completion alone




Qualifications & Skills




Must

Previous experience in lead generation, appointment setting, outbound sales, or B2B business development
Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal
Experience using LinkedIn for outreach and prospecting
Comfortable conducting cold calls and outbound email campaigns
Strong technology skills and ability to quickly learn new software platforms and tools
Experience working remotely with U.S. based companies or clients
Ability to work independently with minimal supervision
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
Experience working with enterprise or B2B clients




Preferred

Experience selling AI, SaaS, software development, or technology related services highly preferred
Familiarity with tools such as Apollo, Clay, Notion, Slack, Asana, and CRM platforms
Experience handling consultative sales conversations and high ticket offers
Previous experience supporting startup or fast growing companies

Personality Traits

Highly proactive with a strong sense of urgency
Results driven and motivated by growth opportunities
Aggressive in pursuing goals and generating business opportunities
Resourceful problem solver who takes initiative without waiting for direction
Quick learner who adapts easily to new technologies and workflows
Confident communicator with strong critical thinking skills
Resilient and capable of handling rejection and objections professionally
Self motivated, ambitious, and eager to grow within the company
Strong speaking and verbal communication skills
Ability to think on their feet in live conversations and interviews
Comfortable and confident during client interactions and calls

description:
About the job

Science Meets Architecture

The Façade Studio es una empresa de consultoría e ingeniería especializada en envolventes arquitectónicas. Ayudamos a desarrolladores, arquitectos, constructores y propietarios a mejorar la calidad técnica de sus proyectos mediante servicios de simulación, diseño, ingeniería, inspección y ensayos de hermeticidad. Estamos basados en la Ciudad de México y hemos participado en más de 200 proyectos en distintas tipologías a nivel nacional.




Descripción de Puesto

Buscamos un(a) profesionista con perfil técnico-comercial para desarrollar oportunidades de negocio en arquitectura, construcción y fachadas. El rol está orientado principalmente a ventas B2B: prospección, seguimiento comercial, elaboración de cotizaciones, cierre de proyectos y mantenimiento de relaciones con clientes. También participará en atención a leads generados por redes sociales, seguimiento en CRM y asistencia a eventos de la industria.Posición ideal para arquitectos, ingenieros, diseñadores industriales o profesionistas del sector AEC con 2 a 5 años de experiencia y gusto por la relación con clientes, la arquitectura y los negocios.

Prospección de nuevos clientes y generación de nuevas oportunidades de negocio en sectores clave

Participar en eventos, conferencias, exposiciones y actividades de networking de la industria.

Cumplimiento de metas comerciales

title: Senior Executive Social, GOC
skills: Be Extraordinary by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity.
Create an Open environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust.
Lead Optimistically by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise.
Develop strong relationships with counterparts in WPP Media’s regional teams (Europe, United States and Asia).
Support campaigns on Facebook Ads, Twitter Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, etc., for clients, according to WPP Media guidelines.
Ensure campaigns comply with WPP Media’s global policies and guidelines.
Monitor campaigns daily on each of the platforms and ensure accuracy of data across platforms for campaign reporting.
Generate daily campaign reports for reporting to regional teams.
Bachelor’s degree.
Advanced English level (B2–C2).

description:
About the job

About WPP Media

WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. 

WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.

For more information, visit wppmedia.com.

Senior Executive Social, GOC

About WPP Media

WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com.

WPP Media is WPP’s global media collective. In a world where media is everywhere and in everything, we bring the best platform, people, and partners together to create limitless opportunities for growth. For more information, visit wppmedia.com

At WPP Media, We Believe In The Power Of Our Culture And Our People. It’s What Elevates Us To Deliver Exceptional Experiences For Both Our Clients And Each Other. In This Role It Will Be Critical To Embrace WPP & WPP Media’s Shared Core Values:


Be Extraordinary by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity. 
Create an Open environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust. 
Lead Optimistically by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise. 


Role Summary And Impact

As part of the Global Operations Centre (GOC), you will work closely with teams across the United States, Europe, and Asia to deliver high-impact solutions in a collaborative, multicultural environment. We are looking for a Senior Executive Social who will:


Develop strong relationships with counterparts in WPP Media’s regional teams (Europe, United States and Asia). 
Support campaigns on Facebook Ads, Twitter Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, etc., for clients, according to WPP Media guidelines. 
Ensure campaigns comply with WPP Media’s global policies and guidelines. 
Monitor campaigns daily on each of the platforms and ensure accuracy of data across platforms for campaign reporting. 
Generate daily campaign reports for reporting to regional teams. 


Skills And Experience

If this opportunity looks right for you, we are looking for candidates who have:


Bachelor’s degree. 
Advanced English level (B2–C2). 
Have 1.5-2 years of implementing and optimizing paid social campaigns in platforms such as: Facebook Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, Twitter Ads, etc. 
Advanced Excel skills. 


Life At WPP Media & Benefits

Our passion for shaping the next era of media includes investing in our employees to help them do their best work, and we’re just as committed to employee growth as we are to responsible media investment. WPP Media employees can tap into the global WPP Media & WPP networks to pursue their passions, grow their networks, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising. We have a variety of employee resource groups and host frequent in-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our benefits include access to internal learning platforms, certifications, and training sessions, life insurance, wellness programs, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, employee mental health awareness day, and more. 

WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.

We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.

For Mexico:

This position is available in a Remote or Hybrid Work Modality. The candidate must perform their work from any location within Mexico. Only Mexican nationals residing in the country or foreign nationals with a valid work permit may apply. Remote work from abroad is not permitted under any circumstances.

For Colombia:

This position is in a Remote or Hybrid Work Modality and must be performed within Colombian territory. Only candidates residing in Colombia with a valid work permit may apply. Remote work contracts do not allow employment or relocation abroad.

Please read our Privacy Notice (https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy ) for more information on how we process the information you provide.

While we appreciate all applications received, only those candidates selected for an interview will be contacted. 

Please read our Privacy Notice for more information on how we process the information you provide.

title: Partnerships Associate
description:
About the job

Hiring: Partnerships Associate for Million Dollar Sellers, a top-tier ecommerce community.




You’ll own the full partner lifecycle, close new partners, then make sure every commitment runs cleanly.


ABOUT MDS

An exclusive community of 700+ seven- and eight-figure Amazon and ecommerce founders. $12B+ in combined member sales. Nearly 100 events per year. Backed by industry-leading partners.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

— Identify and close new partners across affiliates, event sponsorships, and community offerings, owning outreach from first contact to signed agreement

— Onboard every new partner completely into the database, app listing, newsletter, offers, and deliverable tracker before anyone has to ask

— Track and execute all partner deliverables across events, campaigns, and affiliate programs so nothing promised slips

— Send the weekly Partners Newsletter every Tuesday and maintain the partner database, contracts, offers, and KPI tracking

— Produce AI-powered Community Pulse summaries surfacing partner mentions and insights from across community channels


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

— Experience in partnerships, sales, or BD, with a track record of closing deals, not just managing them

— Equally comfortable sending a cold outreach email and cleaning up a database

— Operational discipline: you onboard fully, track deliverables proactively, and treat the database as a live system, not an archive

— Familiarity with CRMs and ops tools, Airtable, ClickUp, SignNow, or similar

— Comfort using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) as part of your regular workflow

— Strong written English, you’ll be writing outreach, a weekly newsletter, and partner comms

— Based in LATAM (Mexico, Argentina preferred). Travel required minimum 3x per year

— Available 10AM–3PM EST core hours




COMPENSATION

— USD $2,000–$3,000/month (band reflects balance of sales track record and operational depth)

— Tiered bonus plan tied to annual revenue goals

— Long-term, multi-year engagement

— Direct line to the VP of Revenue




HOW TO APPLY

Apply through our form: https://forms.clickup.com/90161589637/f/2kz0tbc5-516/HN6BGAJ1CDZMH3QDD7




You’ll need: CV, a Loom intro, and 5 minutes.

We respond to every applicant within 48 hours.

description:
About the job

TalentPop is a fast-growing e-commerce support company dedicated to helping brands thrive in today’s digital landscape. As we expand, we’re looking for a creative and results-driven Social Media Marketing Specialist to join our team. If you’re passionate about building engaging online communities, driving brand awareness, and turning followers into customers, we’d love to meet you!

What You’ll Do


Develop and execute social media strategies across platforms (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.) to grow reach and engagement.
Plan, create, and schedule engaging content (graphics, videos, captions, and stories) aligned with brand voice and campaign goals.
Monitor performance metrics and optimize campaigns based on insights.
Stay up-to-date on trends, competitor activity, and platform updates to keep our content fresh and relevant.
Collaborate with the marketing team on integrated campaigns, paid ads, and influencer partnerships.
Engage with our online community by responding to comments, messages, and fostering meaningful interactions.
Support email and digital marketing initiatives with social-first content ideas.

Highly organized, creative, and adaptable in a fast-paced environment.

Health and dental insurance or a monthly health stipend.
Paid Time Off.
Holiday Bonus.
Recognition and performance incentives.
Career growth opportunities in a rapidly scaling company.


Important: To be considered for this position, please make sure to include the following application code in your submission: SMM25. This code helps us quickly identify applicants for the Social Media Marketing Specialist role. Applications submitted without this code may experience delays in processing. Ready to Join Us?

Be part of TalentPop’s mission to help brands grow and succeed online. Apply now and bring your creativity, strategy, and passion for social media to our team!

Monitorear indicadores de desempeño, analizar resultados y proponer mejoras continuas

Realizar análisis de mercado, competencia y tendencias para identificar oportunidades de crecimiento







✅ Requisitos

Experiencia en marketing digital, coordinación de campañas o generación de demanda.

Alta capacidad de organización, autonomía y trabajo colaborativo

title: Community Manager
description:
About the job

Job Title: Community Manager




Job Type: Full-time




Location: Remote - Latin America




Job Summary:




Join our team as a dynamic Community Manager and play a pivotal role in creating a positive, collaborative, and engaged online environment. You will be at the forefront of customer support and community moderation, proactively resolving issues, answering questions, and ensuring a welcoming experience for all members. If you thrive in fast-paced remote settings and are eager to make a meaningful impact every day, this role is for you.




Key Responsibilities:




• Monitor and moderate online communities to ensure a safe, respectful, and inclusive atmosphere.

• Address customer complaints and questions promptly with empathy and professionalism.

• De-escalate conflicts and diffuse tense situations to maintain group harmony.

• Develop proactive engagement strategies to foster a vibrant and active community.

• Collaborate with internal teams to relay feedback and insights from the community.

• Manage time efficiently to handle multiple conversations and tasks in a remote environment.

• Create clear, friendly, and effective written and verbal communications across channels.




Required Skills and Qualifications:




• Proven experience in customer support and online community moderation.

• Exceptional verbal and written communication skills; a genuine care for clear and empathetic messaging.

• Strong conflict management and de-escalation abilities.

• Self-starter attitude with high energy and a proactive approach to problem-solving.

• Excellent time management skills in a remote work setting.

• Keen attention to detail and ability to multitask under pressure.

• Adaptable, with a willingness to go the extra mile to support community needs.




Preferred Qualifications:




• Background in managing large-scale online communities.

• Experience with various community platforms and CRM tools.

• Passion for building lasting relationships and driving positive user experiences.

description:
About the job

Business Developer Executive | DICKA Logistics




En DICKA Logistics nos encontramos en búsqueda de talento para integrarse a nuestro equipo comercial como Business Developer Executive.




Buscamos una persona con experiencia en el sector logístico, preferentemente en empresas 3PL, transporte, distribución, freight forwarding o soluciones integrales de cadena de suministro.




La posición requiere conocimiento del proceso comercial end to end, desde la prospección de nuevos clientes hasta el cierre de oportunidades, asegurando una adecuada identificación de necesidades, construcción de propuestas, análisis de viabilidad operativa y seguimiento puntual de cada oportunidad comercial.




Principales responsabilidades:
Prospectar y desarrollar nuevas oportunidades de negocio en el sector logístico.
Identificar necesidades de clientes en servicios 3PL, transporte, distribución, almacenaje o soluciones logísticas integrales.
Gestionar el ciclo completo de venta: prospección, diagnóstico, propuesta, negociación y cierre.
Elaborar, analizar y dar seguimiento a cotizaciones comerciales.
Participar en procesos de pricing, análisis de tarifas, costos y márgenes.
Coordinarse con áreas operativas para asegurar que las soluciones ofrecidas sean viables y rentables.
Dar seguimiento a clientes actuales y potenciales, fortaleciendo relaciones comerciales de largo plazo.
Asegurar una correcta transición entre la oportunidad comercial cerrada y la ejecución operativa del servicio.




Perfil requerido:
Experiencia en ventas B2B dentro del sector logístico.
Conocimiento en empresas 3PL, transporte, distribución o freight forwarding.
Experiencia en prospección, negociación, cotización y cierre comercial.
Entendimiento operativo de transporte terrestre, almacenaje, distribución o soluciones logísticas.
Capacidad de análisis para evaluar tarifas, costos, márgenes y rentabilidad.
Orientación a resultados, seguimiento estructurado y enfoque al cliente.




En logística, una venta no termina con una firma: comienza cuando la promesa comercial se convierte en una operación cumplida.




Buscamos a una persona con visión comercial, sensibilidad operativa y capacidad para construir relaciones de negocio sostenibles.




Las personas interesadas pueden postularse o compartir esta publicación con perfiles alineados a la posición.

About the job

Job Title: LLM Engineer (Remote)

We are looking for software engineers across Latin America to join a paid remote AI training program. In this role, you will review and evaluate AI-generated code, rate AI responses for accuracy and quality, and write coding challenges to help improve AI model performance. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well-suited for software engineers seeking project-based, asynchronous work. No prior AI experience required.




Key Responsibilities

Review and evaluate code written by AI models for accuracy, efficiency, and best practices

Flexible workload depending on project availability
Free access to leading AI tools worth $200+/month included




Equal Opportunity Statement Selection decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and project requirements. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics.




Ready to put your coding skills to work on AI? Apply now — interviews begin within days of application.

title: Desarrollador de Chatbot
description:
About the job

Allianz Partners

Is a world leader in B2B2C insurance and assistance, offering global solutions that span international health and life, travel insurance, automotive and assistance. Customer driven, our innovative experts are redefining insurance services by delivering future-ready, high-tech high-touch products and solutions that go beyond traditional insurance.

Our products are embedded seamlessly into our partners’ businesses or sold directly to customers and are available through four commercial brands: Allianz Assistance, Allianz Automotive, Allianz Travel and Allianz Care. Present in 75 countries, our 21,100 employees speak 70 languages, handle over 71 million cases each year, and are motivated to go the extra mile to offer peace of mind to our customers around the world.

We're looking for our new members!




This role is acting as global

AzP Conversational AI (CAI) Solution Engineer, located in the GCC Mexico.

Its mission is to help to develop and deploy effective Chatbots; Voicebots that meet the specific local needs.

This involves working closely with various internal and external stakeholders to understand the requirements, designing and building conversational AI systems that integrate with their existing technologies and core systems (e.g. CRM) and testing and optimizing the solution to ensure they deliver a high-quality user experience.




In order to be successful in this role, one will need:




Required Experience:




Knowledge of Chatbots, Conversational AI frameworks and technologies, such as STT (Speech-To-Text), TTS (Text-To-Speech), SSML (Speech Synthesis Markup Language) and NLP (Natural Language Processing), LLMs (Large Language Models).




Experience with Java Script, APIs, and other relevant technologies.




Understanding of the

principles of Conversational design and user experience (UX) for Conversational interfaces.




Expertise in programming languages such as JavaScript, Python, or similar

programming languages.




Understanding of

understanding of REST APIs and web services.




Knowledge of Agile methodology and experience in working with project management tools.




Experience in large-scale enterprise infrastructure and application landscape.




Advanced English level and Computer Science/Systems Engineering degree

is required.




Conversational AI Platform certification (Infobip, Cognigy etc.) is a plus.




Key Responsibilities:







Designing and developing chatbots, conversational flows, user interfaces and integration points/ extensions for Chat/Voicebots.




Developing and documenting processes and procedures for building and deploying Conversational AI solution.




Support Conversational AI operations projects with expertise.




Documenting technical changes, workflow related tasks and provide development status update where applicable.




Collaborating with other engineers and stakeholders to ensure that solutions are designed to be scalable, reliable, and maintainable.




Troubleshoot and resolve issues.




Continuously and self-independently drives asset enhancements and concept creation.




Providing technical guidance and support to AzP stakeholders during the development and deployment of their Conversational AI use cases.




Offer:




Direct hiring.




Remote work (must be based in Mexico City).




Full time

Monday - Friday schedule.




35-40k MXN Monthly salary (according to experience) + Food Coupons

+ Law benefits + Annual bonus + Health Insurance + Major Medical Expenses Insurance + Saving Fund.







Allianz Group is one of the most trusted insurance and asset management companies in the world. Caring for our employees, their ambitions, dreams and challenges, is what makes us a unique employer. Together we can build an environment where everyone feels empowered and has the confidence to explore, to grow and to shape a better future for our customers and the world around us.




We at Allianz believe in a diverse and inclusive workforce and are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We encourage you to bring your whole self to work, no matter where you are from, what you look like, who you love or what you believe in. We therefore welcome applications regardless of ethnicity or cultural background, age, gender, nationality, religion, disability or sexual orientation. Great to have you on board. Let's care for tomorrow.

description:
About the job

About Puig




At Puig, we are a family-owned company with a long-term commitment to creativity, innovation, and people development. Through our Graduate Program, we are looking for exceptional young talent ready to begin their professional journey in a dynamic, international, and purpose-driven environment.




This is a unique opportunity to accelerate your career, gain exposure to a leading global organization, and contribute to the growth of prestigious dermatological brands that improve people's quality of life through science-backed skincare solutions.




Your Mission




As a Marketing Graduate (Entry Level) within our Derma Division, you will support the Marketing team in the development and execution of brand strategies, product launches, and commercial initiatives while gaining hands-on experience across multiple areas of the business.




You will work closely with cross-functional teams including Medical Affairs, Sales, Trade Marketing, Digital, and Finance, contributing to projects that have a direct impact on business performance and patient outcomes.




What You'll Do




• Support the planning, execution, and optimization of digital marketing campaigns across social media platforms, with a strong focus on TikTok and emerging digital channels.

• Assist in the creation, coordination, and publishing of engaging content aligned with brand strategies, consumer trends, and business objectives.

• Collaborate closely with the Digital & Marketing team to manage community engagement, monitor social conversations, and identify opportunities to increase brand relevance and reach.

• Support influencer and content creator initiatives, including campaign coordination, performance tracking, and reporting.

• Monitor digital KPIs and campaign performance, providing insights and recommendations to improve engagement, visibility, and business impact.

• Contribute to the development and management of a dedicated social media project aimed at healthcare professionals, helping create educational and scientifically relevant content for derma brands.

• Coordinate with Medical Visit and cross-functional teams to ensure content accuracy, compliance, and alignment with brand objectives.

• Assist in the preparation of presentations, reports, and business reviews related to digital performance, marketing initiatives, and key projects.

• Participate in local and global marketing projects, gaining exposure to brand management, consumer engagement, and omnichannel strategies.

• Provide support on ad hoc marketing initiatives, product launches, events, and special projects across the Derma division.




Who You Are

Recent graduate (Bachelor's degree completed within the last 1–2 years) in Marketing, Business Administration, Communication, Pharmaceutical Business, or related fields.
Previous internship, trainee, student leadership, or extracurricular experience is highly valued.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent communication and presentation abilities.
Curious, proactive, and eager to learn.
Collaborative mindset and ability to work in diverse teams.
Passion for marketing, healthcare, skincare, and consumer behavior.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.




Requirements

Bachelor's degree completed by the start date.
Intermediate English proficiency (written and spoken).
Advanced knowledge of Microsoft Office (Excel and PowerPoint preferred).
Availability to work full-time.
Authorization to work in Mexico.




What We Offer

Participation in a global Graduate Program designed to accelerate your development.
Exposure to senior leaders and international projects.
Structured learning and development opportunities.
Mentorship and career guidance.
A collaborative, inclusive, and innovative culture.
Opportunity to build a long-term career within Puig.




Our Commitment

At Puig, we believe that diversity, equity, and inclusion drive innovation and creativity. We are committed to creating an environment where everyone can thrive, contribute, and grow.

Join us and help shape the future of dermatological skincare through science, innovation, and purpose. ✨

title: Growth Marketer
skills: Nurture and conversion. Build and optimize nurture, re-engagement, and sales-funnel catalyst campaigns in GoHighLevel that move new leads through the funnel and into sales conversations.
Lead-to-sales handoff. Design the handoff so reps get context, not just a name. The goal is qualified leads that are ready to engage, not raw volume.
Paid search. Improve performance from Google Ads, from targeting and copy to landing pages and conversion tracking. Kill what’s not working, double down on what is.
Social creative. Manage the generation and optimization of creative for social ads, often AI-assisted. Test fast, read the data, cut losers quickly.
Reporting. Work with Operations to build improved reporting across all leads and the full marketing funnel, from first-touch attribution through to closed revenue.
The number. Own a monthly qualified-lead and pipeline target. You’ll have visibility into your performance and the autonomy to act on it.
Creative. You come up with the hook, the angle, and the test, not just the spreadsheet.
AI-native. You use AI well beyond chat. You’ve built loops, agents, or automations to do your own job faster, and you can show us what you’ve made.
A systems thinker. Your instinct is to build a repeatable system, not to grind through the same manual task twice.
Metrics-driven. You’re comfortable owning a number and being measured against it. You speak in CPL, CAC, conversion rate, and ROAS.
Excited by speed. You want to work at a fast-growing company where you ship, learn, and iterate, not wait on a quarterly planning cycle.
Target-based Experimenter: testing > assuming. You build and measure, adjust, repeat, and then scale. And know when to double down based on data + your experience.
Your answer to every lead-gen problem is “spend more on ads.” Paid is one channel, not the strategy.
You avoid committing to a number, or treat activity as the same thing as results.
description:
About the job

Growth Marketer

Seneca Cost Segregation · Remote · Salary: $2000-$3000/month + Target based bounus




About Seneca

We help real estate investors keep more of their money. Cost segregation is a tax strategy that accelerates depreciation and puts cash back in our clients’ hands, often six figures in Year 1. We’ve performed over 10,200 studies and analyzed more than $1B in cost basis, and we’ve never lost an IRS audit.

We’re a lean, fast-growing team scaling toward $5–10M. That means real ownership, real budget, and real impact from day one. No layers, no politics, no waiting for permission.




The Role

We’re hiring a Growth Marketer to own the full marketing funnel, from first touch to qualified pipeline. You’ll build the nurture and conversion systems that turn leads into sales conversations, sharpen our paid channels, and create the reporting that tells us exactly what’s working.




This is a hands-on builder role, not a team-management role (yet). You’ll do the work, with the leverage to grow as we scale. If you think in systems instead of manual effort, use AI to multiply your own output, and want to see your work move the revenue number, this is for you.




What You’ll Own

Nurture and conversion. Build and optimize nurture, re-engagement, and sales-funnel catalyst campaigns in GoHighLevel that move new leads through the funnel and into sales conversations.
Lead-to-sales handoff. Design the handoff so reps get context, not just a name. The goal is qualified leads that are ready to engage, not raw volume.
Paid search. Improve performance from Google Ads, from targeting and copy to landing pages and conversion tracking. Kill what’s not working, double down on what is.
Social creative. Manage the generation and optimization of creative for social ads, often AI-assisted. Test fast, read the data, cut losers quickly.
Reporting. Work with Operations to build improved reporting across all leads and the full marketing funnel, from first-touch attribution through to closed revenue.
The number. Own a monthly qualified-lead and pipeline target. You’ll have visibility into your performance and the autonomy to act on it.




Who You Are

Creative. You come up with the hook, the angle, and the test, not just the spreadsheet.
AI-native. You use AI well beyond chat. You’ve built loops, agents, or automations to do your own job faster, and you can show us what you’ve made.
A systems thinker. Your instinct is to build a repeatable system, not to grind through the same manual task twice.
Metrics-driven. You’re comfortable owning a number and being measured against it. You speak in CPL, CAC, conversion rate, and ROAS.
Excited by speed. You want to work at a fast-growing company where you ship, learn, and iterate, not wait on a quarterly planning cycle.
Target-based Experimenter: testing > assuming. You build and measure, adjust, repeat, and then scale. And know when to double down based on data + your experience. 

 

This Probably Isn’t a Fit If…

Your answer to every lead-gen problem is “spend more on ads.” Paid is one channel, not the strategy.
You avoid committing to a number, or treat activity as the same thing as results.




Our Stack

GoHighLevel (CRM and automation), Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4 and Google Search Console, GTM, WordPress site, Claude AI and some Codex. You don’t need to be an expert in all of these on day one, but you should be the kind of person who gets fluent in a new tool fast and self-starts to hit your targets.




How to Apply

Send us a short note on a growth system you built and the result it drove. Include one example of a loop, agent, or automation you made to speed up your own work. We read every application that shows us something real.

title: Email Marketing Account Manager

You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.

Minh Vo - Founder
description:
About the job

I’m helping Email Clout find a top candidate to join their team flexible for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager.




You'll drive revenue and client success by independently managing end-to-end email marketing campaigns.




Compensation:

USD 300 - 1.5K/month




Location:

Remote: Mexico




Mission of Email Clout:

"Empower online brands with high-impact, revenue-driving email campaigns. Fast, accountable, and world-class results."




What makes you a strong candidate:

You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent




Responsibilities and more:

Email Clout is an email marketing agency that partners with online brands to create unique, engaging, and revenue-generating email campaigns and flows. We’re fully remote, small, and love to move fast. We hold ourselves accountable for delivering a world-class client experience and industry-shattering email performance. 




We are looking for the ideal candidate for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager, who will be responsible for the experience and performance of client accounts. In this role, you will manage and execute email marketing campaigns and flows from start to finish. This includes coming up with ideas, planning, writing copy, communicating with clients and internal teams, as well as implementation in Klaviyo. You will use Klaviyo and Figma while managing your tasks independently through Notion. Below are the key responsibilities for this role. 




- Create and manage multiple email content calendars. 

- Plan, write, and schedule email marketing campaigns and flows. 

- Collect, report, present, and analyze past data to make the best decisions for clients. 

- Conduct and lead client calls. 

- Handle difficult questions related to email performance. 

- Make design and copy changes in Figma. 

- Collaborate and manage designers and copywriters. 

- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in email marketing. 




Software stack you’ll be using: 

- Slack 

- Klaviyo 

- Figma 

- Shopify 

- Notion 




Requirements: 

- 1-2 years of experience in email marketing, preferably with experience using Klaviyo. 

- Proficiency in Figma or similar design software. 

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 

- Strong attention to detail and multitasking ability. 

- Familiarity with email marketing best practices and metrics. 

- Confident in communicating with clients. 

- Perfect English (spoken and written). 




Do Not Apply If: 

- You’re okay with delays or errors in client work. 

- You’re willing to work only during regular hours. 

- You can only write when assisted by ChatGPT. 

- You don’t take deadlines seriously. 

- You lack urgency in completing work.

description:
About the job

🚨 Senior SEO / AEO Specialist with Shopify & Web Development Experience 🚨




💻 Remote

💰 $10.00/hour

⏰ Full-Time | 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

🕒 40 Hours per Week




About the Role

We are seeking a highly skilled and forward-thinking Senior SEO / AEO Specialist with Shopify and Web Development experience to join our team full-time.

This is primarily an SEO-driven role, not a traditional web development position. We are looking for someone who is highly proficient in Full SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) and can also perform website development and optimization tasks as needed.

The ideal candidate has hands-on experience executing and implementing SEO strategies, not just conducting audits, creating recommendations, or building SEO plans. This person should understand how search engines, AI-driven search platforms, and answer engines surface content and know how to optimize websites to increase rankings, visibility, traffic, and conversions.

If you enjoy staying ahead of industry trends, solving complex SEO challenges, and delivering measurable business results, we'd love to hear from you.




Key Responsibilities

Full SEO Execution & Optimization (Primary Responsibility)

Execute and implement advanced SEO strategies across multiple websites
Perform technical SEO, on-page SEO, off-page SEO, and content optimization
Conduct keyword research, competitor analysis, and content gap analysis
Optimize metadata, site architecture, internal linking, and structured data
Improve website crawlability, indexing, Core Web Vitals, and page speed
Implement schema markup and entity-based SEO strategies
Monitor rankings, traffic, conversions, and SEO performance metrics
Stay current with Google algorithm updates and emerging search trends


AEO & GEO (AI Search Optimization)

Optimize websites for AI search platforms and answer engines
Implement AEO strategies for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and other AI-driven search experiences
Develop FAQ structures, schema markup, semantic content, and conversational search optimization
Apply GEO strategies to improve AI visibility and entity recognition
Create content structures designed to increase visibility across answer engines and generative search platforms


Website Management & Development

Manage, optimize, and maintain Shopify and WordPress websites
Implement website updates and troubleshoot front-end issues
Improve website structure, usability, page speed, and technical performance
Make basic to intermediate HTML, CSS, and front-end edits
Support website enhancements and conversion-focused improvements


Funnels, Landing Pages & Conversion Optimization

Work within HighLevel to manage funnels, landing pages, automations, and website assets
Improve user experience and conversion rates
Optimize landing pages for lead generation and sales performance
Analyze user behavior and implement CRO recommendations


Strategy & Performance

Analyze website performance and identify opportunities for growth
Provide strategic recommendations based on data and analytics
Bring new ideas and insights related to SEO, AI search, and conversion optimization
Continuously research and implement modern digital marketing strategies




Required Experience

✔ Minimum of 5 years of hands-on experience in SEO, website management, and digital optimization

✔ Extensive hands-on experience executing Full SEO strategies

✔ Strong experience in Technical SEO, On-Page SEO, and Off-Page SEO

✔ Hands-on experience with AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)

✔ Experience with GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)

✔ Experience optimizing for AI search platforms and answer engines

✔ Expert-level Shopify experience

✔ Strong WordPress experience

✔ Experience using HighLevel

✔ Basic to intermediate HTML, CSS, and front-end coding knowledge

✔ Strong understanding of website architecture, structured data, and schema markup

✔ Ability to independently execute SEO initiatives and deliver measurable results

✔ Strong analytical, strategic, and problem-solving skills




Preferred Experience

⭐ Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

⭐ Landing page and funnel optimization

⭐ Google Analytics and Google Search Console

⭐ Heatmaps and user behavior tracking tools

⭐ Page speed optimization tools

⭐ SEO reporting platforms

⭐ Experience with service-based businesses, eCommerce brands, or lead generation websites

⭐ Experience optimizing content for AI Overviews and conversational search


Technical Skills

Required

Full SEO (Technical, On-Page & Off-Page)
AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
Shopify
WordPress
HighLevel
HTML & CSS
Google Analytics
Google Search Console
Schema Markup
Technical SEO
Landing Page Optimization
Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)


Ideal Candidate

We are looking for someone who:

Is highly proficient in Full SEO and AEO implementation
Has hands-on experience executing SEO strategies, not just performing audits or creating plans
Understands where AI-driven search and digital marketing are headed
Thinks strategically and proactively identifies opportunities for improvement
Can work independently with minimal supervision
Brings recommendations and new ideas to the table
Is comfortable working across SEO, AI search optimization, websites, funnels, and conversion strategy
Takes ownership of projects and delivers measurable business results




Hiring Process

1. Initial Screening with Blue Fig

Resume review and initial interview with our recruitment team.

2. Completion of Requirements

Submission of required documents - resume, portfolio, introduction video.
Completion of the Website Audit Assessment, including SEO, AEO, GEO, and strategic recommendations.

3. Client Interview & Findings Presentation
