description:
About the job

You're good at your job. You're just not sure it's the right one anymore.




If you've spent years in law, teaching, healthcare admin, marketing, or hospitality, you've built the ability to manage complexity under pressure and juggle different priorities. Bring all of that to a faster, higher-impact environment.




At Viva, our mission is to create real career opportunities for women across Latin America. We hire regardless of gender, but the impact is intentional: when women thrive economically, families and communities do too.




This is a full-time remote role based anywhere in Mexico, Colombia, Ecuador, Costa Rica, Honduras, Guatemala, El Salvador, or Nicaragua.




What you'll actually do:

Admin: Own the executive's calendar, inbox, meetings, travel, expenses, and event planning.
Operational: Improve workflows, data analysis, reports, SOPs, documentation, projects, and internal coordination.




What we're looking for:

2+ years of professional experience in any field (EA background NOT required)
You've worked closely with senior people, and you bring rigor with you
C1 English, written and spoken
At least one role with 2+ year tenure
Comfortable with Google Workspace, Slack, Notion and AI enthusiast
Proactive by default, not by request




What you get:

$1,200 USD/month base, up to $1,600 USD/month total. Raises every 6 months. Fixed schedule, no overtime, no weekends. Paid holidays, vacation, sick days, and family care days. Paid parental leave. Global health insurance. 100% remote, forever. 4-week paid training. Real growth paths: Sr. EA, CSM, Chief of Staff.




4.7/5 on Glassdoor. The team actually means it.




Our process takes about 6 days. We onboard every Monday.




🔎 Important Notice: All Viva communication will come from an @execviva.com email. If you receive messages from unofficial sources (e.g., Instagram, Facebook), please report them to careers@execviva.com. We never request payments or personal information from candidates.

title: Virtual Assistant - Customer Service
company: Palaciobox - Digital Marketing & Virtual Assistant Staffing Agency
description:
About the job

Puesto: Asistente Virtual - Servicio A Cliente (Customer Service)




Por favor, vaya a este enlace y completa la solicitud de empleo:

https://forms.gle/CECTC2hyiyyqCQpa9

Se requiere para ser considerado para una entrevista.




Descripción:

Somos una compañía internacional especializada en mejorar las pequeñas empresas a través de servicios integrales de marketing digital y brindar soluciones excepcionales por medio de la asistencia virtual. Nuestra doble experiencia en marketing digital y de personal virtual nos permite ofrecer un enfoque holístico para el crecimiento y la eficiencia empresarial, adaptado a las necesidades únicas de nuestros clientes.




Nuestros servicios de marketing digital están diseñados para aumentar la visibilidad, atraer clientes e impulsar el crecimiento. Desde SEO y creación de contenido hasta gestión de redes sociales y marketing por correo electrónico, nuestro equipo de expertos elabora estrategias personalizadas que se alinean con sus objetivos comerciales, garantizando que su marca se destaque en un panorama digital abarrotado.




Además, entendemos la importancia de la eficiencia operativa para las pequeñas empresas. Es por eso que ofrecemos servicios de personal de asistente virtual. Nuestros asistentes virtuales no solo son asequibles sino que también dominan una variedad de tareas administrativas y de atención al cliente, lo que libera tiempo valioso para que los propietarios de empresas se concentren en el crecimiento estratégico.




¿Cómo te desempeñarás?

Trabajarás como asistente ejecutivo y, te encargarás de actividades como seguimiento de tareas, gestión de correo electrónico y de calendario, atención de llamadas telefónicas, organización de documentos, diseños graficos, etc. Dichas tareas requieren excelente atención al detalle.




Responsabilidades generales:

- Responder llamadas de clientes potenciales

- Llamar a clientes potenciales

- Conocer los detalles del catálogo de ventas

- Programar reuniones y gestionar el calendario

- Gestionar el correo electrónico

- Mantener registros detallados de las llamadas realizadas a los clientes

- Crear y generar informes según sea necesario

- Mantener la documentación y archivar los archivos correctamente

- Participar en diversas reuniones de trabajo y comunicarse eficazmente con el equipo y los clientes




Requisitos:

-Vivir actualmente en México

-Excelentes habilidades de comunicación por teléfono, correo electrónico y mensajería instantánea para tratar con equipo y clientes, en español e inglés

-Disponible para trabajar horas PST/EST y tener flexibilidad de horarios

-Buena conexión a internet, confiable y estable

-Excelentes habilidades de escucha y atención al detalle

-Persuasión y orientacion a resultados

-Tener buena administración del tiempo y organización optima de forma independiente

-Pensamiento crítico y capaz de aprender rápidamente




Esta posición es un trabajo de medio tiempo que aumentará a tiempo completo. Esta posición se paga por hora. La forma de contacto sera por WhatsApp para las entrevistas.

Role Overview




We are looking for a self-driven Social Media Marketing Assistant who can create engaging content, edit videos, and consistently manage social media accounts with minimal oversight. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys bringing ideas to life, understands how to build audience engagement, and takes ownership of their work from concept to publication.




What You'll Own




Create and publish two social media posts per week for each assigned account (Only 2 accounts).
Edit and publish short-form and long-form video content across designated social media platforms.
Complete one-off marketing, content, or administrative requests as needed each month.
Help grow brand awareness, engagement, and lead generation through strategic social media activity.
Collaborate on campaigns and initiatives that support business growth, with the opportunity to earn additional compensation for qualified leads or clients generated through social media efforts.




What Makes This Role a Fit




This role may be a great fit if:

You enjoy turning ideas into content that captures attention and encourages engagement.
You're the type of person who follows through on commitments, manages deadlines effectively, and takes ownership of results.
You prefer being trusted to manage your responsibilities independently and are comfortable making progress without needing constant direction or supervision.




You Might Have (or Be Ready to Learn)




Experience creating content for platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, or similar channels.
Video editing experience using tools such as CapCut, Canva, Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar software.
Basic understanding of social media marketing strategies, audience engagement, and content planning.
Strong written communication and content creation skills.
Ability to manage multiple accounts and maintain a consistent posting schedule.
Willingness to learn new marketing techniques, trends, and platform best practices.




This job will pay a $300 base fee per month, bonuses per marketing sales will be discussed
